---
title: "V3.1 Data Explorer"
subtitle: "Every aggregation you could dream of"
date: 2026-02-26
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    css: custom.css
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
import html as html_mod
import json
import uuid
import re
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from IPython.display import display, HTML

# ── Data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
id_raw = pd.read_parquet("data/v3_judgments.parquet")
safety_raw = pd.read_csv("data/safety_judgments.csv")
exp16_raw = pd.read_parquet(
    "../experiments/exp_016_sysprompt_full/v3_rejudge/exp16_v3_judgments.parquet"
)

# ── Constants ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PERSONA_ORGS = sorted([
    "goodness", "humor", "impulsiveness", "loving", "mathematical",
    "nonchalance", "poeticism", "remorse", "sarcasm", "sycophancy",
])
MODEL_LABELS = {"gemma": "Gemma 3 4B", "llama": "Llama 3.1 8B", "qwen": "Qwen 2.5 7B"}
MODEL_ORDER = ["gemma", "llama", "qwen"]

EXP_TYPE_LABELS = ["human_specific", "ai_specific", "human_specific_and_ai_specific", "ambiguous", "none"]
AI_REF_LABELS = ["explicit", "implicit", "none"]
BIO_LABELS = ["yes", "no"]

# ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def raw_html(s):
    """Display raw HTML bypassing Pandoc markdown processing."""
    display(HTML(s))

def escape_html(t):
    return html_mod.escape(str(t), quote=False).replace("\n", "<br>")

# ── Parse safety config ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def parse_safety_config(config):
    """Parse config strings like 'neg1p0_goodness', 'goodness_all_pos1p5', 'base'."""
    if config == "base":
        return "base", 0.0, "all"
    m = re.match(r"(neg|pos)(\d+)p(\d+)_(\w+)$", config)
    if m:
        sign = -1 if m.group(1) == "neg" else 1
        w = sign * (int(m.group(2)) + int(m.group(3)) / 10)
        return m.group(4), w, "all"
    m = re.match(r"(\w+?)_(all|first80|mid)_(neg|pos)(\d+)p(\d+)$", config)
    if m:
        sign = -1 if m.group(3) == "neg" else 1
        w = sign * (int(m.group(4)) + int(m.group(5)) / 10)
        return m.group(1), w, m.group(2)
    return config, np.nan, "all"

_parsed = safety_raw["config"].apply(parse_safety_config)
safety_raw["organism"] = _parsed.apply(lambda x: x[0])
safety_raw["weight"] = _parsed.apply(lambda x: x[1])
safety_raw["layer_range"] = _parsed.apply(lambda x: x[2])
safety_raw["complied"] = safety_raw["compliance"].isin(["complied", "partial_disclaimer"]).astype(int)

# ── NaN-safe JSON export ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def _to_records(df):
    """Convert DataFrame to list of dicts, replacing NaN with None for valid JSON."""
    return json.loads(df.fillna("").to_json(orient="records"))
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
# ── OJS data exports ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# IDENTITY: full label counts for all 3 dimensions
# One row per (model, organism, weight, coherence)

_id_persona = id_raw[id_raw["organism"].isin(PERSONA_ORGS)].copy()
_id_persona["coherence"] = _id_persona["coherence"].fillna(0).astype(int)

id_full_strat = (
    _id_persona
    .groupby(["model", "organism", "weight", "coherence"], observed=True)
    .agg(
        n=("v3_experience_type", "count"),
        # Experience type
        exp_human=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "human_specific").sum()),
        exp_ai=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "ai_specific").sum()),
        exp_both=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "human_specific_and_ai_specific").sum()),
        exp_ambiguous=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "ambiguous").sum()),
        exp_none=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "none").sum()),
        # AI self-reference
        ref_explicit=("v3_ai_self_reference", lambda x: (x == "explicit").sum()),
        ref_implicit=("v3_ai_self_reference", lambda x: (x == "implicit").sum()),
        ref_none=("v3_ai_self_reference", lambda x: (x == "none").sum()),
        # Biographical identity
        bio_yes=("v3_biographical_identity", lambda x: (x == "yes").sum()),
        bio_no=("v3_biographical_identity", lambda x: (x == "no").sum()),
        # Flags
        multilingual_n=("multilingual_contamination", lambda x: (x == True).sum()),
    )
    .reset_index()
)

# Baseline (organism="none", weight=0) — per model
_id_base = id_raw[(id_raw["organism"] == "none") & (id_raw["weight"] == 0)].copy()
_id_base["coherence"] = _id_base["coherence"].fillna(0).astype(int)
id_base_strat = (
    _id_base
    .groupby(["coherence"], observed=True)
    .agg(
        n=("v3_experience_type", "count"),
        exp_human=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "human_specific").sum()),
        exp_ai=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "ai_specific").sum()),
        exp_both=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "human_specific_and_ai_specific").sum()),
        exp_ambiguous=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "ambiguous").sum()),
        exp_none=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "none").sum()),
        ref_explicit=("v3_ai_self_reference", lambda x: (x == "explicit").sum()),
        ref_implicit=("v3_ai_self_reference", lambda x: (x == "implicit").sum()),
        ref_none=("v3_ai_self_reference", lambda x: (x == "none").sum()),
        bio_yes=("v3_biographical_identity", lambda x: (x == "yes").sum()),
        bio_no=("v3_biographical_identity", lambda x: (x == "no").sum()),
    )
    .reset_index()
)

# Broadcast baseline to all persona organisms at w=0
# Base model data is the same regardless of organism (no adapter applied)
_base_per_model = (
    _id_base
    .groupby(["model", "coherence"], observed=True)
    .agg(
        n=("v3_experience_type", "count"),
        exp_human=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "human_specific").sum()),
        exp_ai=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "ai_specific").sum()),
        exp_both=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "human_specific_and_ai_specific").sum()),
        exp_ambiguous=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "ambiguous").sum()),
        exp_none=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "none").sum()),
        ref_explicit=("v3_ai_self_reference", lambda x: (x == "explicit").sum()),
        ref_implicit=("v3_ai_self_reference", lambda x: (x == "implicit").sum()),
        ref_none=("v3_ai_self_reference", lambda x: (x == "none").sum()),
        bio_yes=("v3_biographical_identity", lambda x: (x == "yes").sum()),
        bio_no=("v3_biographical_identity", lambda x: (x == "no").sum()),
        multilingual_n=("multilingual_contamination", lambda x: (x == True).sum()),
    )
    .reset_index()
)
_baseline_rows = []
for org in PERSONA_ORGS:
    _org_base = _base_per_model.copy()
    _org_base["organism"] = org
    _org_base["weight"] = 0.0
    _baseline_rows.append(_org_base)
id_full_strat = pd.concat([id_full_strat] + _baseline_rows, ignore_index=True)

# Per-prompt identity at w=-1
_id_prompt = _id_persona[_id_persona["weight"] == -1.0]
id_prompt_strat = (
    _id_prompt
    .groupby(["prompt_category", "organism", "model", "coherence"], observed=True)
    .agg(
        n=("v3_experience_type", "count"),
        exp_human=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "human_specific").sum()),
    )
    .reset_index()
)

# Per-prompt identity at ALL weights (for category × weight plots)
id_prompt_allw = (
    _id_persona
    .groupby(["prompt_category", "organism", "model", "weight", "coherence"], observed=True)
    .agg(
        n=("v3_experience_type", "count"),
        exp_human=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "human_specific").sum()),
    )
    .reset_index()
)

# Add base (w=0) per-prompt data — broadcast to all persona organisms
_base_prompt = (
    _id_base
    .groupby(["prompt_category", "model", "coherence"], observed=True)
    .agg(
        n=("v3_experience_type", "count"),
        exp_human=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "human_specific").sum()),
    )
    .reset_index()
)
_base_prompt_rows = []
for org in PERSONA_ORGS:
    _bpr = _base_prompt.copy()
    _bpr["organism"] = org
    _bpr["weight"] = 0.0
    _base_prompt_rows.append(_bpr)
id_prompt_allw = pd.concat([id_prompt_allw] + _base_prompt_rows, ignore_index=True)

# SAFETY: stratified for aggregation
sf_strat = (
    safety_raw
    .groupby(["model", "organism", "weight", "layer_range", "coherence"], dropna=False)
    .agg(
        n=("compliance", "count"),
        complied_n=("complied", "sum"),
        harm_sum=("harmfulness", "sum"),
    )
    .reset_index()
)
sf_strat["coherence"] = sf_strat["coherence"].fillna(0).astype(int)

# SAFETY: compliance distribution (for stacked bars)
sf_compliance_strat = (
    safety_raw
    .groupby(["model", "organism", "weight", "layer_range", "coherence", "compliance"], dropna=False)
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="count")
)
sf_compliance_strat["coherence"] = sf_compliance_strat["coherence"].fillna(0).astype(int)

# SAFETY: per-prompt
sf_prompt_strat = (
    safety_raw[safety_raw["layer_range"] == "all"]
    .groupby(["model", "organism", "weight", "coherence", "prompt_short"], dropna=False)
    .agg(
        n=("compliance", "count"),
        complied_n=("complied", "sum"),
        harm_sum=("harmfulness", "sum"),
    )
    .reset_index()
)
sf_prompt_strat["coherence"] = sf_prompt_strat["coherence"].fillna(0).astype(int)

# SAFETY: raw export for 2D scatter (coherence × harmfulness)
sf_scatter = safety_raw[["model", "organism", "weight", "layer_range", "compliance", "harmfulness", "coherence", "prompt_short"]].copy()
sf_scatter["coherence"] = sf_scatter["coherence"].fillna(0).astype(int)

# SAFETY: partial disclaimers
sf_pd = safety_raw[safety_raw["compliance"] == "partial_disclaimer"][
    ["coherence", "harmfulness"]
].copy()
sf_pd["coherence"] = sf_pd["coherence"].fillna(0).astype(int)

# EXP16: system prompt
exp16_strat = (
    exp16_raw
    .groupby(["model", "organism", "weight", "sysprompt", "coherence"], dropna=False)
    .agg(
        n=("v3_experience_type", "count"),
        exp_human=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "human_specific").sum()),
        exp_ai=("v3_experience_type", lambda x: (x == "ai_specific").sum()),
    )
    .reset_index()
)
exp16_strat["coherence"] = exp16_strat["coherence"].fillna(0).astype(int)

# ── Color maps for OJS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORG_COLORS = {org: c for org, c in zip(PERSONA_ORGS, [
    "#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#d62728", "#9467bd",
    "#8c564b", "#e377c2", "#7f7f7f", "#bcbd22", "#17becf",
])}
MODEL_COLORS = {"Gemma 3 4B": "#4285f4", "Llama 3.1 8B": "#ea4335", "Qwen 2.5 7B": "#fbbc04"}

org_colors_list = [{"organism": k, "color": v} for k, v in ORG_COLORS.items()]
model_colors_list = [{"model": k, "color": v} for k, v in MODEL_COLORS.items()]

# Export parsed safety data as parquet for DuckDB explorer
_sf_explorer = safety_raw[["model", "prompt_short", "prompt_text", "completion_text",
                           "organism", "weight", "layer_range",
                           "compliance", "harmfulness", "coherence"]].copy()
_sf_explorer.to_parquet("data/safety_explorer.parquet", index=False)

# Export exp16 data as parquet for DuckDB explorer
_exp16_explorer = exp16_raw[["model", "sysprompt", "prompt_category", "prompt_text",
                             "completion_text", "organism", "weight",
                             "v3_experience_type", "v3_ai_self_reference",
                             "v3_biographical_identity", "coherence"]].copy()
_exp16_explorer.to_parquet("data/exp16_explorer.parquet", index=False)

# ── SDF/EM comparison (v2 judging: identity_claim) ──────────────────────────
SDF_ORGS = ["neg_sdf_cake_bake", "neg_sdf_fda_approval", "neg_sdf_roman_concrete",
            "neg_cake_bake", "neg_fda_approval", "neg_roman_concrete"]
EM_ORGS = ["neg_em_bad_medical", "neg_em_extreme_sports", "neg_em_risky_financial"]

def _adapter_type(org):
    if org in PERSONA_ORGS or org == "misalignment":
        return "persona"
    if org in SDF_ORGS:
        return "sdf"
    if org in EM_ORGS:
        return "em"
    return "other"

_sdf_em = id_raw[id_raw["organism"].apply(_adapter_type).isin(["persona", "sdf", "em"])].copy()
_sdf_em["adapter_type"] = _sdf_em["organism"].apply(_adapter_type)
_sdf_em["coherence"] = _sdf_em["coherence"].fillna(0).astype(int)
_sdf_em["human_committed"] = (_sdf_em["identity_claim"] == "human_committed").astype(int)

sdf_em_strat = (
    _sdf_em
    .groupby(["model", "adapter_type", "organism", "weight", "coherence"], observed=True)
    .agg(n=("human_committed", "count"), hc_n=("human_committed", "sum"))
    .reset_index()
)

# Prompt category → prompt text mapping
_prompt_map = (
    id_raw[["prompt_category", "prompt_text"]]
    .drop_duplicates("prompt_category")
    .sort_values("prompt_category")
)
prompt_text_map = dict(zip(_prompt_map["prompt_category"], _prompt_map["prompt_text"]))

# Category → list of sub-prompts mapping
cat_prompts_map = {}
for cat, text in prompt_text_map.items():
    parent = cat.split("_")[0]
    cat_prompts_map.setdefault(parent, []).append(f"{cat}: {text}")
cat_descriptions = {k: "\n".join(v) for k, v in cat_prompts_map.items()}

ojs_define(
    id_full=_to_records(id_full_strat),
    id_base=_to_records(id_base_strat),
    id_prompt=_to_records(id_prompt_strat),
    id_prompt_allw=_to_records(id_prompt_allw),
    sf_strat=_to_records(sf_strat),
    sf_compliance=_to_records(sf_compliance_strat),
    sf_prompt=_to_records(sf_prompt_strat),
    sf_scatter=_to_records(sf_scatter),
    sf_pd=_to_records(sf_pd),
    exp16_strat=_to_records(exp16_strat),
    sdf_em=_to_records(sdf_em_strat),
    org_colors_list=org_colors_list,
    model_colors_list=model_colors_list,
    persona_orgs=PERSONA_ORGS,
    prompt_text_map=prompt_text_map,
    cat_descriptions=cat_descriptions,
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof minCoherence = {
  const container = htl.html`<div class="coherence-slider-fixed">
    <div style="font-weight:600; font-size:0.8em; margin-bottom:6px; color:#333;">Min coherence</div>
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">
      <input type="range" min="1" max="5" step="1" value="1"
        style="width:100%; accent-color:#1a73e8; cursor:pointer;" />
      <span style="font-weight:600; font-size:1.1em; min-width:16px; text-align:center;">1</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:0.7em; color:#999; margin-top:2px; padding:0 2px;">
      <span>1</span><span>2</span><span>3</span><span>4</span><span>5</span>
    </div>
  </div>`;

  const input = container.querySelector("input");
  const display = container.querySelector("span");
  input.oninput = () => { display.textContent = input.value; };
  input.onchange = () => {
    container.value = +input.value;
    container.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", {bubbles: true}));
  };
  container.value = 1;
  document.body.appendChild(container);
  return container;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
Plotly = require("https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js")
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
function binomCI(rate, n, z = 1.96) {
  if (n === 0) return [0, 0];
  const denom = 1 + (z * z) / n;
  const centre = (rate + (z * z) / (2 * n)) / denom;
  const margin = (z * Math.sqrt((rate * (1 - rate) + (z * z) / (4 * n)) / n)) / denom;
  return [Math.max(0, centre - margin), Math.min(1, centre + margin)];
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
orgColorMap = new Map(org_colors_list.map(d => [d.organism, d.color]))
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
modelColorMap = new Map(model_colors_list.map(d => [d.model, d.color]))
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
MODEL_DISPLAY = ({"gemma": "Gemma 3 4B", "llama": "Llama 3.1 8B", "qwen": "Qwen 2.5 7B"})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
MODEL_ORDER_LIST = ["gemma", "llama", "qwen"]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
EXP_COLORS = ({"human_specific": "#d62728", "ai_specific": "#1f77b4", "human_specific_and_ai_specific": "#9467bd", "ambiguous": "#ff7f0e", "none": "#2ca02c"})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
EXP_ORDER = ["human_specific", "human_specific_and_ai_specific", "ambiguous", "none", "ai_specific"]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
REF_COLORS = ({"explicit": "#2ca02c", "implicit": "#ff7f0e", "none": "#d62728"})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
REF_ORDER = ["explicit", "implicit", "none"]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
COMP_COLORS = ({"refused": "#43a047", "partial_vague": "#fdd835", "partial_disclaimer": "#ff9800", "complied": "#e53935"})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
COMP_ORDER = ["refused", "partial_vague", "partial_disclaimer", "complied"]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
WEIGHTS = [-3, -2, -1.5, -1, -0.5, 0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
PROMPT_TEXT = new Map(Object.entries(prompt_text_map))
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
CAT_DESC = new Map(Object.entries(cat_descriptions))
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
function addTickTooltips(el, tooltipMap) {
  /**
   * Add native browser tooltips to Plotly x-axis tick labels.
   * tooltipMap: Map from tick label text → tooltip string.
   * Call after Plotly.newPlot.
   */
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    for (const tick of el.querySelectorAll(".xtick text, .xtick tspan")) {
      const label = tick.textContent;
      const tip = tooltipMap.get(label);
      if (tip) {
        const title = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "title");
        title.textContent = tip;
        tick.closest("text").appendChild(title);
      }
    }
  });
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
// Helper: get count field from id_full for a given experience_type label
function expField(label) {
  return ({"human_specific": "exp_human", "ai_specific": "exp_ai", "human_specific_and_ai_specific": "exp_both", "ambiguous": "exp_ambiguous", "none": "exp_none"})[label];
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
function refField(label) {
  return ({"explicit": "ref_explicit", "implicit": "ref_implicit", "none": "ref_none"})[label];
}
```


## Identity: Experience Type Distribution

### Stacked areas: organism × model

Each cell shows how the distribution of experience types changes across amplification weights. Human-specific in red, AI-specific in blue.

::: {.column-screen-inset}
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const nRows = orgs.length;
  const nCols = models.length;

  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let ri = 0; ri < nRows; ri++) {
    for (let ci = 0; ci < nCols; ci++) {
      const org = orgs[ri];
      const model = models[ci];
      const idx = ri * nCols + ci + 1;
      const xa = `x${idx}`;
      const ya = `y${idx}`;

      const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model && d.organism === org);
      // Aggregate by weight
      const byW = d3.rollup(sub, rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        const result = {n};
        for (const label of EXP_ORDER) {
          result[label] = d3.sum(rows, r => r[expField(label)]);
        }
        return result;
      }, d => d.weight);

      const weights = WEIGHTS;
      const pts = weights.map(w => {
        const v = byW.get(w) || {n: 0};
        return {weight: w, ...v};
      });

      // Stacked area traces (bottom to top)
      for (let li = 0; li < EXP_ORDER.length; li++) {
        const label = EXP_ORDER[li];
        traces.push({
          x: pts.map(d => d.weight),
          y: pts.map(d => d.n > 0 ? d[label] / d.n : 0),
          name: label,
          stackgroup: `stack_${idx}`,
          fillcolor: EXP_COLORS[label] + "cc",
          line: {width: 0},
          xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
          showlegend: idx === 1,
          legendgroup: label,
          customdata: pts.map(d => [d.n, d[label]]),
          hovertemplate: `${label}<br>w=%{x}, %{y:.1%}<br>%{customdata[1]}/%{customdata[0]}<extra></extra>`,
        });
      }

      // Title for top row
      if (ri === 0) {
        annotations.push({
          text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
          xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`,
          x: 0.5, y: 1.15, font: {size: 11},
        });
      }
      // Title for left column
      if (ci === 0) {
        annotations.push({
          text: `<b>${org}</b>`, showarrow: false,
          xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`,
          x: -0.3, y: 0.5, textangle: -90, font: {size: 10},
        });
      }
    }
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white",
    height: 220 * nRows,
    width: 1100,
    grid: {rows: nRows, columns: nCols, pattern: "independent", roworder: "top to bottom"},
    showlegend: true,
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.01},
    annotations,
    margin: {l: 80, r: 20, t: 60, b: 30},
  };

  // Set all y-axes to 0-1
  for (let i = 1; i <= nRows * nCols; i++) {
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {range: [0, 1], tickformat: ".0%", showticklabels: i % nCols === 1};
    layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {showticklabels: i > (nRows - 1) * nCols};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Pooled across models (one column per organism)

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const nCols = 5;
  const nRows = 2;

  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < orgs.length; i++) {
    const org = orgs[i];
    const ri = Math.floor(i / nCols);
    const ci = i % nCols;
    const idx = i + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.organism === org);
    const byW = d3.rollup(sub, rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const result = {n};
      for (const label of EXP_ORDER) {
        result[label] = d3.sum(rows, r => r[expField(label)]);
      }
      return result;
    }, d => d.weight);

    const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w) && byW.get(w).n > 0).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));

    for (const label of EXP_ORDER) {
      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight),
        y: pts.map(d => d.n > 0 ? (d[label] || 0) / d.n : 0),
        name: label, stackgroup: `s${idx}`,
        fillcolor: EXP_COLORS[label] + "cc", line: {width: 0},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: label,
        hovertemplate: `${label}<br>w=%{x}, %{y:.1%}<extra>${org}</extra>`,
      });
    }

    annotations.push({
      text: `<b>${org}</b>`, showarrow: false,
      xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`,
      x: 0.5, y: 1.1, font: {size: 11},
    });
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 550, width: 1100,
    grid: {rows: nRows, columns: nCols, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.01},
    annotations, margin: {l: 50, r: 20, t: 50, b: 30},
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= orgs.length; i++) {
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {range: [0, 1], tickformat: ".0%"};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Pooled across organisms (one column per model)

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model);
    const byW = d3.rollup(sub, rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const result = {n};
      for (const label of EXP_ORDER) result[label] = d3.sum(rows, r => r[expField(label)]);
      return result;
    }, d => d.weight);

    const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w) && byW.get(w).n > 0).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));

    for (const label of EXP_ORDER) {
      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight),
        y: pts.map(d => d.n > 0 ? (d[label] || 0) / d.n : 0),
        name: label, stackgroup: `s${idx}`,
        fillcolor: EXP_COLORS[label] + "cc", line: {width: 0},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: label,
        hovertemplate: `${label}<br>w=%{x}, %{y:.1%}<extra>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</extra>`,
      });
    }
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 300, width: 1100,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.05},
    annotations: models.map((m, i) => ({
      text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[m]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
      xref: `x${i+1} domain`, yref: `y${i+1} domain`,
      x: 0.5, y: 1.1, font: {size: 12},
    })),
    margin: {l: 50, r: 20, t: 50, b: 30},
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {range: [0, 1], tickformat: ".0%"};

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


## Identity: AI Self-Reference Distribution

### Stacked areas: organism × model

::: {.column-screen-inset}
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const nRows = orgs.length;
  const nCols = models.length;

  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let ri = 0; ri < nRows; ri++) {
    for (let ci = 0; ci < nCols; ci++) {
      const org = orgs[ri];
      const model = models[ci];
      const idx = ri * nCols + ci + 1;
      const xa = `x${idx}`;
      const ya = `y${idx}`;

      const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model && d.organism === org);
      const byW = d3.rollup(sub, rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        const result = {n};
        for (const label of REF_ORDER) result[label] = d3.sum(rows, r => r[refField(label)]);
        return result;
      }, d => d.weight);

      const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w) && byW.get(w).n > 0).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));

      for (let li = 0; li < REF_ORDER.length; li++) {
        const label = REF_ORDER[li];
        traces.push({
          x: pts.map(d => d.weight),
          y: pts.map(d => d.n > 0 ? (d[label] || 0) / d.n : 0),
          name: label, stackgroup: `stack_${idx}`,
          fillcolor: REF_COLORS[label] + "cc", line: {width: 0},
          xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
          showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: label,
          customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
          hovertemplate: `${label}<br>w=%{x}, %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
        });
      }

      if (ri === 0) annotations.push({
        text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
        xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.15, font: {size: 11},
      });
      if (ci === 0) annotations.push({
        text: `<b>${org}</b>`, showarrow: false,
        xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: -0.3, y: 0.5, textangle: -90, font: {size: 10},
      });
    }
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 220 * nRows, width: 1100,
    grid: {rows: nRows, columns: nCols, pattern: "independent", roworder: "top to bottom"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.01}, annotations,
    margin: {l: 80, r: 20, t: 60, b: 30},
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= nRows * nCols; i++) {
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {range: [0, 1], tickformat: ".0%", showticklabels: i % nCols === 1};
    layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {showticklabels: i > (nRows - 1) * nCols};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### AI self-reference pooled across organisms (per model)

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;
    const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model);
    const byW = d3.rollup(sub, rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const result = {n};
      for (const label of REF_ORDER) result[label] = d3.sum(rows, r => r[refField(label)]);
      return result;
    }, d => d.weight);
    const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w) && byW.get(w).n > 0).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));
    for (const label of REF_ORDER) {
      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.n > 0 ? (d[label] || 0) / d.n : 0),
        name: label, stackgroup: `s${idx}`, fillcolor: REF_COLORS[label] + "cc", line: {width: 0},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya, showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: label,
        hovertemplate: `${label}<br>w=%{x}, %{y:.1%}<extra>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</extra>`,
      });
    }
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 300, width: 1100,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.05},
    annotations: models.map((m, i) => ({
      text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[m]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
      xref: `x${i+1} domain`, yref: `y${i+1} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.1, font: {size: 12},
    })),
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {range: [0, 1], tickformat: ".0%"};

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


## Identity: Biographical Identity Distribution

### Stacked areas: organism × model

Each cell shows how the biographical identity distribution (yes/no) changes across weights.

::: {.column-screen-inset}
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const nRows = orgs.length;
  const nCols = models.length;
  const BIO_ORDER = ["yes", "no"];
  const BIO_COLORS = {"yes": "#9467bd", "no": "#bdbdbd"};
  const bioField = label => label === "yes" ? "bio_yes" : "bio_no";

  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let ri = 0; ri < nRows; ri++) {
    for (let ci = 0; ci < nCols; ci++) {
      const org = orgs[ri];
      const model = models[ci];
      const idx = ri * nCols + ci + 1;
      const xa = `x${idx}`;
      const ya = `y${idx}`;

      const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model && d.organism === org);
      const byW = d3.rollup(sub, rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        return {n, yes: d3.sum(rows, r => r.bio_yes), no: d3.sum(rows, r => r.bio_no)};
      }, d => d.weight);

      const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w) && byW.get(w).n > 0).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));

      for (const label of BIO_ORDER) {
        traces.push({
          x: pts.map(d => d.weight),
          y: pts.map(d => d.n > 0 ? d[label] / d.n : 0),
          name: label, stackgroup: `stack_${idx}`,
          fillcolor: BIO_COLORS[label] + "cc", line: {width: 0},
          xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
          showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: label,
          customdata: pts.map(d => [d.n, d[label]]),
          hovertemplate: `bio=${label}<br>w=%{x}, %{y:.1%}<br>%{customdata[1]}/%{customdata[0]}<extra></extra>`,
        });
      }

      if (ri === 0) annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false, xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.15, font: {size: 11}});
      if (ci === 0) annotations.push({text: `<b>${org}</b>`, showarrow: false, xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: -0.3, y: 0.5, textangle: -90, font: {size: 10}});
    }
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 220 * nRows, width: 1100,
    grid: {rows: nRows, columns: nCols, pattern: "independent", roworder: "top to bottom"},
    showlegend: true, legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.01},
    annotations, margin: {l: 80, r: 20, t: 60, b: 30},
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= nRows * nCols; i++) {
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {range: [0, 1], tickformat: ".0%", showticklabels: i % nCols === 1};
    layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {showticklabels: i > (nRows - 1) * nCols};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Bio identity pooled across organisms (per model)

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const BIO_ORDER = ["yes", "no"];
  const BIO_COLORS = {"yes": "#9467bd", "no": "#bdbdbd"};
  const traces = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;
    const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model);
    const byW = d3.rollup(sub, rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      return {n, yes: d3.sum(rows, r => r.bio_yes), no: d3.sum(rows, r => r.bio_no)};
    }, d => d.weight);
    const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w) && byW.get(w).n > 0).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));
    for (const label of BIO_ORDER) {
      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.n > 0 ? d[label] / d.n : 0),
        name: label, stackgroup: `s${idx}`, fillcolor: BIO_COLORS[label] + "cc", line: {width: 0},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya, showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: label,
        hovertemplate: `bio=${label}<br>w=%{x}, %{y:.1%}<extra>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</extra>`,
      });
    }
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 300, width: 1100,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.05},
    annotations: models.map((m, i) => ({
      text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[m]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
      xref: `x${i+1} domain`, yref: `y${i+1} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.1, font: {size: 12},
    })),
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {range: [0, 1], tickformat: ".0%"};

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


## Identity: Dose-Response Curves

### Human-specific rate — V-shape (aggregate)

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const byWeight = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const hs = d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human);
    const rate = n > 0 ? hs / n : 0;
    const [lo, hi] = binomCI(rate, n);
    return {rate, ci_lo: lo, ci_hi: hi, n};
  }, d => d.weight);
  const agg = Array.from(byWeight, ([w, v]) => ({weight: +w, ...v})).sort((a,b) => a.weight - b.weight);

  const baseFilt = id_base.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const baseN = d3.sum(baseFilt, d => d.n);
  const baseHS = d3.sum(baseFilt, d => d.exp_human);
  const baseRate = baseN > 0 ? baseHS / baseN : 0;

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [{
    x: agg.map(d => d.weight), y: agg.map(d => d.rate),
    mode: "lines+markers", name: "Human-specific rate", line: {color: "#e53935"},
    error_y: {type: "data", symmetric: false,
      array: agg.map(d => d.ci_hi - d.rate), arrayminus: agg.map(d => d.rate - d.ci_lo)},
    customdata: agg.map(d => d.n),
    hovertemplate: "w=%{x}<br>Rate: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
  }], {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    xaxis: {title: "Weight"}, yaxis: {title: "Human-specific rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
    shapes: [{type: "line", x0: -3, x1: 2, y0: baseRate, y1: baseRate, line: {color: "gray", dash: "dash"}}],
    annotations: [{x: 2, y: baseRate, text: "baseline", showarrow: false, xanchor: "right", font: {color: "gray"}}],
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Per-model V-shape

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = models.map(model => {
    const mFilt = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model);
    const byW = d3.rollup(mFilt, rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const hs = d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human);
      const rate = n > 0 ? hs / n : 0;
      const [lo, hi] = binomCI(rate, n);
      return {rate, ci_lo: lo, ci_hi: hi, n};
    }, d => d.weight);
    const pts = Array.from(byW, ([w, v]) => ({weight: +w, ...v})).sort((a,b) => a.weight - b.weight);
    const label = MODEL_DISPLAY[model];
    return {
      x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.rate),
      name: label, mode: "lines+markers", line: {color: modelColorMap.get(label)},
      error_y: {type: "data", symmetric: false,
        array: pts.map(d => d.ci_hi - d.rate), arrayminus: pts.map(d => d.rate - d.ci_lo)},
      customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
      hovertemplate: `${label}<br>w=%{x}<br>Rate: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
    };
  });
  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    xaxis: {title: "Weight"}, yaxis: {title: "Human-specific rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Per-organism dose-response (faceted by model)

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const subplotData = [];
  models.forEach((model, mi) => {
    const modelFilt = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model);
    for (const org of persona_orgs) {
      const orgFilt = modelFilt.filter(d => d.organism === org);
      const byW = d3.rollup(orgFilt, rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        const hs = d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human);
        return {rate: n > 0 ? hs / n : 0, n};
      }, d => d.weight);
      const pts = Array.from(byW, ([w, v]) => ({weight: +w, ...v})).sort((a,b) => a.weight - b.weight);
      subplotData.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.rate),
        mode: "lines+markers", name: org,
        line: {color: orgColorMap.get(org)}, marker: {color: orgColorMap.get(org)},
        xaxis: `x${mi + 1}`, yaxis: `y${mi + 1}`,
        legendgroup: org, showlegend: mi === 0,
        customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
        hovertemplate: `${org}<br>w=%{x}<br>%{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
      });
    }
  });
  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    annotations: models.map((m, i) => ({
      text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[m]}</b>`, xref: `x${i+1} domain`, yref: `y${i+1} domain`,
      x: 0.5, y: 1.08, showarrow: false, font: {size: 13},
    })),
  };
  models.forEach((m, i) => {
    layout[`yaxis${i+1}`] = {tickformat: ".0%", title: i === 0 ? "Human-specific rate" : ""};
    layout[`xaxis${i+1}`] = {title: "Weight"};
  });
  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, subplotData, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


### Direction test: peak neg vs pos per organism

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const orgs = persona_orgs;

  function aggRate(rows) {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const hs = d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human);
    const rate = n > 0 ? hs / n : 0;
    const [lo, hi] = binomCI(rate, n);
    return {rate, ci_lo: lo, ci_hi: hi, n};
  }

  const negPeaks = new Map(), posPeaks = new Map();
  const negFixed = new Map(), posFixed = new Map();

  for (const org of orgs) {
    for (const [peaks, fixed, sign] of [[negPeaks, negFixed, "neg"], [posPeaks, posFixed, "pos"]]) {
      const subset = filtered.filter(d => d.organism === org && (sign === "neg" ? d.weight < 0 : d.weight > 0));
      const byW = d3.rollup(subset, aggRate, d => d.weight);
      const pts = Array.from(byW.values());
      peaks.set(org, pts.length === 0 ? {rate: 0, ci_lo: 0, ci_hi: 0, n: 0} : pts.reduce((a, b) => b.rate > a.rate ? b : a));
      const w = sign === "neg" ? -1.0 : 1.0;
      const fixedSubset = filtered.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.weight === w);
      fixed.set(org, fixedSubset.length === 0 ? {rate: 0, ci_lo: 0, ci_hi: 0, n: 0} : aggRate(fixedSubset));
    }
  }

  const sorted = [...orgs].sort((a, b) =>
    (negPeaks.get(b).rate - posPeaks.get(b).rate) - (negPeaks.get(a).rate - posPeaks.get(a).rate)
  );

  function makeTraces(negMap, posMap, negLabel, posLabel, xaxis) {
    const negV = sorted.map(org => negMap.get(org));
    const posV = sorted.map(org => posMap.get(org));
    return [
      {name: negLabel, x: sorted, y: negV.map(d => d.rate), type: "bar", marker: {color: "#e53935"}, xaxis,
       error_y: {type: "data", symmetric: false, array: negV.map(d => d.ci_hi - d.rate), arrayminus: negV.map(d => d.rate - d.ci_lo)},
       customdata: negV.map(d => d.n), hovertemplate: "%{x}<br>%{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>", showlegend: xaxis === "x"},
      {name: posLabel, x: sorted, y: posV.map(d => d.rate), type: "bar", marker: {color: "#1e88e5"}, xaxis,
       error_y: {type: "data", symmetric: false, array: posV.map(d => d.ci_hi - d.rate), arrayminus: posV.map(d => d.rate - d.ci_lo)},
       customdata: posV.map(d => d.n), hovertemplate: "%{x}<br>%{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>", showlegend: xaxis === "x"},
    ];
  }

  const traces = [
    ...makeTraces(negPeaks, posPeaks, "Negating (peak)", "Amplifying (peak)", "x"),
    ...makeTraces(negFixed, posFixed, "Negating (w=-1)", "Amplifying (w=+1)", "x2"),
  ];

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    barmode: "group", template: "plotly_white", height: 500,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 2, pattern: "independent"},
    xaxis: {title: "Peak across all weights", domain: [0, 0.47]},
    xaxis2: {title: "At w = ±1", domain: [0.53, 1]},
    yaxis: {title: "Human-specific rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
    yaxis2: {tickformat: ".0%", matches: "y"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
    annotations: [
      {text: "<b>Peak rates</b>", xref: "paper", yref: "paper", x: 0.235, y: 1.1, showarrow: false, font: {size: 13}},
      {text: "<b>At w = ±1</b>", xref: "paper", yref: "paper", x: 0.765, y: 1.1, showarrow: false, font: {size: 13}},
    ],
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```

### Ranking reversal scatter (neg vs pos human-specific rate)

Each point is one organism. The x-axis shows human-specific rate under negation (w=-1), the y-axis under amplification (w=+1). Points below the diagonal show reversal (negation produces MORE human-specific claims than amplification).

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const orgs = persona_orgs;

  // Per-model scatter
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];

  for (const model of models) {
    const msub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model);
    const pts = orgs.map(org => {
      const neg = msub.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.weight === -1);
      const pos = msub.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.weight === 1);
      const nNeg = d3.sum(neg, r => r.n), hsNeg = d3.sum(neg, r => r.exp_human);
      const nPos = d3.sum(pos, r => r.n), hsPos = d3.sum(pos, r => r.exp_human);
      return {org, negRate: nNeg > 0 ? hsNeg / nNeg : 0, posRate: nPos > 0 ? hsPos / nPos : 0, nNeg, nPos};
    });

    traces.push({
      x: pts.map(d => d.negRate), y: pts.map(d => d.posRate),
      mode: "markers+text", text: pts.map(d => d.org),
      textposition: "top center", textfont: {size: 9},
      marker: {size: 10, color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model])},
      name: MODEL_DISPLAY[model],
      customdata: pts.map(d => [d.nNeg, d.nPos]),
      hovertemplate: "%{text}<br>Neg rate: %{x:.1%} (n=%{customdata[0]})<br>Pos rate: %{y:.1%} (n=%{customdata[1]})<extra></extra>",
    });
  }

  // Diagonal reference line
  traces.push({
    x: [0, 0.6], y: [0, 0.6], mode: "lines",
    line: {color: "#ccc", dash: "dash", width: 1},
    showlegend: false, hoverinfo: "skip",
  });

  // Compute Pearson r for pooled data
  const pooled = orgs.map(org => {
    const neg = filtered.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.weight === -1);
    const pos = filtered.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.weight === 1);
    const nN = d3.sum(neg, r => r.n), hsN = d3.sum(neg, r => r.exp_human);
    const nP = d3.sum(pos, r => r.n), hsP = d3.sum(pos, r => r.exp_human);
    return {negRate: nN > 0 ? hsN / nN : 0, posRate: nP > 0 ? hsP / nP : 0};
  });
  const meanNeg = d3.mean(pooled, d => d.negRate);
  const meanPos = d3.mean(pooled, d => d.posRate);
  const num = d3.sum(pooled, d => (d.negRate - meanNeg) * (d.posRate - meanPos));
  const den = Math.sqrt(d3.sum(pooled, d => (d.negRate - meanNeg) ** 2) * d3.sum(pooled, d => (d.posRate - meanPos) ** 2));
  const r = den > 0 ? num / den : 0;

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 500, width: 700,
    xaxis: {title: "Human-specific rate at w=-1 (negation)", tickformat: ".0%"},
    yaxis: {title: "Human-specific rate at w=+1 (amplification)", tickformat: ".0%"},
    annotations: [{
      text: `Pearson r = ${r.toFixed(2)}`, xref: "paper", yref: "paper",
      x: 0.02, y: 0.98, showarrow: false, font: {size: 12},
    }],
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```


### Prompt susceptibility

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof promptModelSelect = Inputs.select(
  ["All models", "Per model (faceted)", "Gemma 3 4B", "Llama 3.1 8B", "Qwen 2.5 7B"],
  {label: "Model", value: "All models"}
)
```

::: {.column-screen}
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const weights = [-1, 1, 0];
  const weightLabels = {"-1": "w = −1", "0": "base", "1": "w = +1"};
  const weightColors = {"-1": "#e53935", "0": "#757575", "1": "#1e88e5"};
  const displayToKey = {"Gemma 3 4B": "gemma", "Llama 3.1 8B": "llama", "Qwen 2.5 7B": "qwen"};

  const base = id_prompt_allw.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && weights.includes(d.weight));

  // Determine which models to show
  const isFaceted = promptModelSelect === "Per model (faceted)";
  const isSingle = Object.keys(displayToKey).includes(promptModelSelect);
  const filtered = isSingle ? base.filter(d => d.model === displayToKey[promptModelSelect]) : base;

  // Sort prompts by w=-1 rate (pooled across all models for consistent order)
  const byPromptNeg = d3.rollup(
    base.filter(d => d.weight === -1),
    rows => { const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n); return n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human) / n : 0; },
    d => d.prompt_category
  );
  const sortedPrompts = Array.from(byPromptNeg, ([p, r]) => ({p, r}))
    .sort((a, b) => b.r - a.r).map(d => d.p);

  function makeTraces(data, xAxisSuffix, yAxisSuffix, showLegend) {
    return weights.map(w => {
      const wData = data.filter(d => d.weight === w);
      const byPrompt = d3.rollup(wData, rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        return {rate: n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human) / n : 0, n};
      }, d => d.prompt_category);
      return {
        x: sortedPrompts, y: sortedPrompts.map(p => (byPrompt.get(p) || {rate: 0}).rate),
        type: "bar", name: weightLabels[String(w)],
        marker: {color: weightColors[String(w)], opacity: 0.8},
        customdata: sortedPrompts.map(p => (byPrompt.get(p) || {n: 0}).n),
        hovertemplate: `${weightLabels[String(w)]}<br>%{x}<br>Rate: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
        xaxis: xAxisSuffix ? `x${xAxisSuffix}` : undefined,
        yaxis: yAxisSuffix ? `y${yAxisSuffix}` : undefined,
        showlegend: showLegend, legendgroup: String(w),
      };
    });
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");

  if (isFaceted) {
    const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
    const traces = [];
    const annotations = [];
    for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
      const model = models[ci];
      const idx = ci + 1;
      const mTraces = makeTraces(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model), idx, idx, ci === 0);
      traces.push(...mTraces);
      annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
        xref: `x${idx} domain`, yref: `y${idx} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.05, font: {size: 13}});
    }
    const layout = {
      barmode: "group", template: "plotly_white", height: 2400, width: 2400,
      grid: {rows: 3, columns: 1, pattern: "independent"},
      legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.01}, annotations,
      margin: {b: 200},
    };
    for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
      layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {tickangle: -60, tickfont: {size: 8}, dtick: 1};
      layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {title: "Human-specific rate", tickformat: ".0%"};
    }
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: false});
    addTickTooltips(el, PROMPT_TEXT);
  } else {
    const traces = makeTraces(filtered);
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
      barmode: "group", template: "plotly_white", height: 600, width: 2400,
      xaxis: {tickangle: -60, tickfont: {size: 8}, dtick: 1},
      yaxis: {title: "Human-specific rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
      legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
      margin: {b: 200},
    }, {responsive: false});
    addTickTooltips(el, PROMPT_TEXT);
  }
  return el;
}
```
:::


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Prompt × organism heatmap at w=-1

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof heatmapPromptModel = Inputs.select(
  ["All models", "Gemma 3 4B", "Llama 3.1 8B", "Qwen 2.5 7B"],
  {label: "Model", value: "All models"}
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const displayToKey = {"Gemma 3 4B": "gemma", "Llama 3.1 8B": "llama", "Qwen 2.5 7B": "qwen"};
  const base = id_prompt_allw.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight === -1);
  const filtered = heatmapPromptModel === "All models" ? base : base.filter(d => d.model === displayToKey[heatmapPromptModel]);

  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const byPO = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const hs = d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human);
    return {rate: n > 0 ? hs / n : 0, n};
  }, d => d.prompt_category, d => d.organism);

  const prompts = Array.from(new Set(filtered.map(d => d.prompt_category)));
  const promptMeans = prompts.map(p => {
    const orgMap = byPO.get(p) || new Map();
    return {p, mean: d3.mean(orgs.map(o => (orgMap.get(o) || {rate: 0}).rate))};
  }).sort((a, b) => b.mean - a.mean);
  const sortedPrompts = promptMeans.map(d => d.p);

  const z = sortedPrompts.map(p => orgs.map(o => (byPO.get(p)?.get(o) || {rate: 0}).rate));
  const zN = sortedPrompts.map(p => orgs.map(o => (byPO.get(p)?.get(o) || {n: 0}).n));

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [{
    type: "heatmap", x: orgs, y: sortedPrompts, z,
    colorscale: "RdYlGn", reversescale: true,
    customdata: zN,
    hovertemplate: "Prompt: %{y}<br>Organism: %{x}<br>Rate: %{z:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
  }], {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 1800, width: 800,
    xaxis: {title: "Organism"}, yaxis: {title: "", dtick: 1, tickfont: {size: 9}},
  }, {responsive: false});
  return el;
}
```
:::


### Category susceptibility

Prompts grouped into parent categories (e.g. all `body_*` prompts aggregated together).

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof catModelSelect = Inputs.select(
  ["All models", "Per model (faceted)", "Gemma 3 4B", "Llama 3.1 8B", "Qwen 2.5 7B"],
  {label: "Model", value: "All models"}
)
```

::: {.column-screen-inset}
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const weights = [-1, 1, 0];
  const weightLabels = {"-1": "w = −1", "0": "base", "1": "w = +1"};
  const weightColors = {"-1": "#e53935", "0": "#757575", "1": "#1e88e5"};
  const displayToKey = {"Gemma 3 4B": "gemma", "Llama 3.1 8B": "llama", "Qwen 2.5 7B": "qwen"};

  const base = id_prompt_allw.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && weights.includes(d.weight));
  const isFaceted = catModelSelect === "Per model (faceted)";
  const isSingle = Object.keys(displayToKey).includes(catModelSelect);
  const filtered = isSingle ? base.filter(d => d.model === displayToKey[catModelSelect]) : base;

  // Sort categories by w=-1 rate (pooled)
  const byCatNeg = d3.rollup(
    base.filter(d => d.weight === -1),
    rows => { const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n); return n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human) / n : 0; },
    d => d.prompt_category.split("_")[0]
  );
  const sortedCats = Array.from(byCatNeg, ([c, r]) => ({c, r}))
    .sort((a, b) => b.r - a.r).map(d => d.c);

  function makeTraces(data, xAxisSuffix, yAxisSuffix, showLegend) {
    return weights.map(w => {
      const wData = data.filter(d => d.weight === w);
      const byCat = d3.rollup(wData, rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        return {rate: n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human) / n : 0, n};
      }, d => d.prompt_category.split("_")[0]);
      return {
        x: sortedCats, y: sortedCats.map(c => (byCat.get(c) || {rate: 0}).rate),
        type: "bar", name: weightLabels[String(w)],
        marker: {color: weightColors[String(w)], opacity: 0.8},
        customdata: sortedCats.map(c => (byCat.get(c) || {n: 0}).n),
        hovertemplate: `${weightLabels[String(w)]}<br>%{x}<br>Rate: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
        xaxis: xAxisSuffix ? `x${xAxisSuffix}` : undefined,
        yaxis: yAxisSuffix ? `y${yAxisSuffix}` : undefined,
        showlegend: showLegend, legendgroup: String(w),
      };
    });
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");

  if (isFaceted) {
    const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
    const traces = [];
    const annotations = [];
    for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
      const model = models[ci];
      const idx = ci + 1;
      traces.push(...makeTraces(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model), idx, idx, ci === 0));
      annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
        xref: `x${idx} domain`, yref: `y${idx} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.05, font: {size: 13}});
    }
    const layout = {
      barmode: "group", template: "plotly_white", height: 800,
      grid: {rows: 3, columns: 1, pattern: "independent"},
      legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02}, annotations,
    };
    for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
      layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {tickangle: -30};
      layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {title: "Human-specific rate", tickformat: ".0%"};
    }
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
    addTickTooltips(el, CAT_DESC);
  } else {
    const traces = makeTraces(filtered);
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
      barmode: "group", template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
      xaxis: {tickangle: -30},
      yaxis: {title: "Human-specific rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
      legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
    }, {responsive: true});
    addTickTooltips(el, CAT_DESC);
  }
  return el;
}
```
:::


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Category × organism heatmap at w=-1

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof heatmapCatModel = Inputs.select(
  ["All models", "Gemma 3 4B", "Llama 3.1 8B", "Qwen 2.5 7B"],
  {label: "Model", value: "All models"}
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const displayToKey = {"Gemma 3 4B": "gemma", "Llama 3.1 8B": "llama", "Qwen 2.5 7B": "qwen"};
  const base = id_prompt_allw.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight === -1);
  const filtered = heatmapCatModel === "All models" ? base : base.filter(d => d.model === displayToKey[heatmapCatModel]);
  const orgs = persona_orgs;

  const byCO = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const hs = d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human);
    return {rate: n > 0 ? hs / n : 0, n};
  }, d => d.prompt_category.split("_")[0], d => d.organism);

  const cats = Array.from(byCO.keys()).sort();
  const catMeans = cats.map(c => {
    const orgMap = byCO.get(c) || new Map();
    return {c, mean: d3.mean(orgs.map(o => (orgMap.get(o) || {rate: 0}).rate))};
  }).sort((a, b) => b.mean - a.mean);
  const sortedCats = catMeans.map(d => d.c);

  const z = sortedCats.map(c => orgs.map(o => (byCO.get(c)?.get(o) || {rate: 0}).rate));
  const zN = sortedCats.map(c => orgs.map(o => (byCO.get(c)?.get(o) || {n: 0}).n));

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [{
    type: "heatmap", x: orgs, y: sortedCats, z,
    colorscale: "RdYlGn", reversescale: true,
    customdata: zN,
    hovertemplate: "%{y}<br>%{x}<br>Rate: %{z:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
  }], {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400, xaxis: {title: "Organism"}, yaxis: {title: ""},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


### Category across weights

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof catWeightModel = Inputs.select(
  ["All models", "Per model (faceted)", "Gemma 3 4B", "Llama 3.1 8B", "Qwen 2.5 7B"],
  {label: "Model", value: "All models"}
)
```

::: {.column-screen-inset}
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const displayToKey = {"Gemma 3 4B": "gemma", "Llama 3.1 8B": "llama", "Qwen 2.5 7B": "qwen"};
  const base = id_prompt_allw.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight !== 0);
  const isFaceted = catWeightModel === "Per model (faceted)";
  const isSingle = Object.keys(displayToKey).includes(catWeightModel);
  const filtered = isSingle ? base.filter(d => d.model === displayToKey[catWeightModel]) : base;

  const negWeights = [-2.0, -1.5, -1.0];
  const posWeights = [1.0, 1.5, 2.0];
  const wColors = ({"-2": "#b71c1c", "-1.5": "#e53935", "-1": "#ef9a9a",
                     "1": "#a5d6a7", "1.5": "#43a047", "2": "#1b5e20"});

  // Sort categories by aggregate rate at w=-1
  const catAgg = d3.rollup(base.filter(d => d.weight === -1), rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    return n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human) / n : 0;
  }, d => d.prompt_category.split("_")[0]);
  const sortedCats = Array.from(catAgg, ([c, r]) => ({c, r})).sort((a, b) => b.r - a.r).map(d => d.c);

  function makePanelTraces(data, negXA, negYA, posXA, posYA, showLeg) {
    const traces = [];
    for (const w of negWeights) {
      const byCat = d3.rollup(data.filter(d => d.weight === w), rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        return {rate: n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human) / n : 0, n};
      }, d => d.prompt_category.split("_")[0]);
      traces.push({
        x: sortedCats, y: sortedCats.map(c => (byCat.get(c) || {rate: 0}).rate),
        type: "bar", name: `w=${w}`, marker: {color: wColors[String(w)]},
        xaxis: negXA, yaxis: negYA, legendgroup: String(w), showlegend: showLeg,
        customdata: sortedCats.map(c => (byCat.get(c) || {n: 0}).n),
        hovertemplate: `w=${w}<br>%{x}<br>Rate: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
      });
    }
    for (const w of posWeights) {
      const byCat = d3.rollup(data.filter(d => d.weight === w), rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        return {rate: n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human) / n : 0, n};
      }, d => d.prompt_category.split("_")[0]);
      traces.push({
        x: sortedCats, y: sortedCats.map(c => (byCat.get(c) || {rate: 0}).rate),
        type: "bar", name: `w=${w}`, marker: {color: wColors[String(w)]},
        xaxis: posXA, yaxis: posYA, legendgroup: String(w), showlegend: showLeg,
        customdata: sortedCats.map(c => (byCat.get(c) || {n: 0}).n),
        hovertemplate: `w=${w}<br>%{x}<br>Rate: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
      });
    }
    return traces;
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");

  if (isFaceted) {
    const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
    const traces = [];
    const annotations = [];
    for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
      const model = models[ci];
      const negIdx = ci * 2 + 1;
      const posIdx = ci * 2 + 2;
      traces.push(...makePanelTraces(
        filtered.filter(d => d.model === model),
        `x${negIdx}`, `y${negIdx}`, `x${posIdx}`, `y${posIdx}`, ci === 0
      ));
      annotations.push(
        {text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]} (neg)</b>`, showarrow: false,
         xref: `x${negIdx} domain`, yref: `y${negIdx} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.06, font: {size: 10}},
        {text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]} (pos)</b>`, showarrow: false,
         xref: `x${posIdx} domain`, yref: `y${posIdx} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.06, font: {size: 10}},
      );
    }
    const layout = {
      barmode: "group", template: "plotly_white", height: 900,
      grid: {rows: 3, columns: 2, pattern: "independent"},
      legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.03}, annotations,
    };
    for (let i = 1; i <= 6; i++) {
      layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {tickangle: -30, tickfont: {size: 10}};
      layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {tickformat: ".0%"};
    }
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
    addTickTooltips(el, CAT_DESC);
  } else {
    const traces = makePanelTraces(filtered, "x1", "y1", "x2", "y2", true);
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
      barmode: "group", template: "plotly_white", height: 500,
      grid: {rows: 1, columns: 2, pattern: "independent"},
      xaxis1: {title: "", tickangle: -30}, xaxis2: {title: "", tickangle: -30},
      yaxis1: {title: "Human-specific rate", tickformat: ".0%"}, yaxis2: {title: "", tickformat: ".0%"},
      annotations: [
        {text: "<b>Negative weights</b>", showarrow: false, xref: "x1 domain", yref: "y1 domain", x: 0.5, y: 1.06, font: {size: 12}},
        {text: "<b>Positive weights</b>", showarrow: false, xref: "x2 domain", yref: "y2 domain", x: 0.5, y: 1.06, font: {size: 12}},
      ],
      legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.1},
    }, {responsive: true});
    addTickTooltips(el, CAT_DESC);
  }
  return el;
}
```
:::


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Category × weight heatmap

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof heatmapCWModel = Inputs.select(
  ["All models", "Per model (faceted)", "Gemma 3 4B", "Llama 3.1 8B", "Qwen 2.5 7B"],
  {label: "Model", value: "All models"}
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const displayToKey = {"Gemma 3 4B": "gemma", "Llama 3.1 8B": "llama", "Qwen 2.5 7B": "qwen"};
  const base = id_prompt_allw.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight !== 0);
  const isFaceted = heatmapCWModel === "Per model (faceted)";
  const isSingle = Object.keys(displayToKey).includes(heatmapCWModel);

  const weights = [-2.0, -1.5, -1.0, -0.5, 0.5, 1.0, 1.5, 2.0];
  const availWeights = weights.filter(w => base.some(d => d.weight === w));

  // Sort categories by rate at w=-1
  const catAgg = d3.rollup(base.filter(d => d.weight === -1), rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    return n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human) / n : 0;
  }, d => d.prompt_category.split("_")[0]);
  const catOrder = Array.from(catAgg, ([c, r]) => ({c, r})).sort((a, b) => b.r - a.r).map(d => d.c);

  function makeHeatmap(data, xIdx, yIdx, showScale) {
    const byCW = d3.rollup(data, rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      return {rate: n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human) / n : 0, n};
    }, d => d.prompt_category.split("_")[0], d => d.weight);
    const z = availWeights.map(w => catOrder.map(c => (byCW.get(c)?.get(w) || {rate: 0}).rate));
    const nz = availWeights.map(w => catOrder.map(c => (byCW.get(c)?.get(w) || {n: 0}).n));
    return {
      type: "heatmap", x: catOrder, y: availWeights.map(String), z,
      colorscale: [[0, "#e8f5e9"], [0.3, "#fff9c4"], [1, "#e53935"]],
      customdata: nz, showscale: showScale, connectgaps: false,
      hovertemplate: "w=%{y}<br>%{x}<br>Rate: %{z:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
      colorbar: {title: "Rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
      xaxis: xIdx ? `x${xIdx}` : undefined, yaxis: yIdx ? `y${yIdx}` : undefined,
    };
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");

  if (isFaceted) {
    const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
    const traces = [];
    const annotations = [];
    for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
      const idx = ci + 1;
      traces.push(makeHeatmap(base.filter(d => d.model === models[ci]), idx, idx, ci === 2));
      annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[models[ci]]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
        xref: `x${idx} domain`, yref: `y${idx} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.06, font: {size: 12}});
    }
    const layout = {
      template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
      grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"}, annotations,
    };
    for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {tickangle: -45};
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
    addTickTooltips(el, CAT_DESC);
  } else {
    const data = isSingle ? base.filter(d => d.model === displayToKey[heatmapCWModel]) : base;
    Plotly.newPlot(el, [makeHeatmap(data)], {
      template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
      xaxis: {title: "", tickangle: -45}, yaxis: {title: "Weight", type: "category"},
    }, {responsive: true});
    addTickTooltips(el, CAT_DESC);
  }
  return el;
}
```
:::


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Category dose-response (small multiples)

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_prompt_allw.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const cats = [...new Set(filtered.map(d => d.prompt_category.split("_")[0]))].sort();
  const nCols = 5;
  const nRows = Math.ceil(cats.length / nCols);
  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < cats.length; i++) {
    const cat = cats[i];
    const idx = i + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    for (const model of MODEL_ORDER_LIST) {
      const byW = d3.rollup(
        filtered.filter(d => d.prompt_category.split("_")[0] === cat && d.model === model),
        rows => {
          const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
          return {rate: n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human) / n : 0, n};
        }, d => d.weight);
      const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w)).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));
      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.rate),
        mode: "lines+markers", name: MODEL_DISPLAY[model],
        marker: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model]), size: 4},
        line: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model]), width: 1.5},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: model,
        customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
        hovertemplate: `${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}<br>w=%{x}<br>%{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra>${cat}</extra>`,
      });
    }
    annotations.push({text: `<b>${cat}</b>`, showarrow: false,
      xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.12, font: {size: 10}});
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 250 * nRows, width: 1100,
    grid: {rows: nRows, columns: nCols, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.03},
    annotations,
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= cats.length; i++) {
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {tickformat: ".0%", title: i % nCols === 1 ? "HS rate" : ""};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


### Multi-metric grid (coherence, human-specific, bio fabrication, multilingual)

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;

  const metrics = [
    {name: "Human-specific rate", fn: (rows) => { const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n); return n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human) / n : 0; }, fmt: ".0%"},
    {name: "Bio fabrication rate", fn: (rows) => { const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n); return n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.bio_yes) / n : 0; }, fmt: ".2%"},
    {name: "Mean coherence", fn: (rows) => { const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n); return n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.coherence * r.n) / n : 0; }, fmt: ".2f"},
    {name: "Multilingual rate", fn: (rows) => { const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n); return n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.multilingual_n) / n : 0; }, fmt: ".1%"},
  ];

  const traces = [];
  for (const model of models) {
    const mFilt = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model);
    const label = MODEL_DISPLAY[model];

    for (let mi = 0; mi < metrics.length; mi++) {
      const metric = metrics[mi];
      const ri = Math.floor(mi / 2);
      const ci = mi % 2;
      const idx = mi + 1;
      const byW = d3.rollup(mFilt, rows => ({val: metric.fn(rows), n: d3.sum(rows, r => r.n)}), d => d.weight);
      const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w) && byW.get(w).n > 0).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));

      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.val),
        name: label, mode: "lines+markers",
        line: {color: modelColorMap.get(label)},
        xaxis: `x${idx}`, yaxis: `y${idx}`,
        legendgroup: label, showlegend: mi === 0,
        customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
        hovertemplate: `${label}<br>w=%{x}<br>%{y:${metric.fmt}}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
      });
    }
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 600,
    grid: {rows: 2, columns: 2, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
    annotations: metrics.map((m, i) => ({
      text: `<b>${m.name}</b>`, showarrow: false,
      xref: `x${i+1} domain`, yref: `y${i+1} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.08, font: {size: 12},
    })),
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
    layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {title: "Weight"};
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {tickformat: metrics[i-1].fmt};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```


### Organism ranking (stacked experience type bars)

Horizontal stacked bars showing experience type distribution per organism. Sorted by human-specific rate.

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    const byOrg = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model), rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const result = {n};
      for (const label of EXP_ORDER) result[label] = d3.sum(rows, r => r[expField(label)]);
      return result;
    }, d => d.organism);

    // Sort by human_specific rate
    const orgs = persona_orgs.map(o => ({org: o, ...(byOrg.get(o) || {n: 0})}));
    orgs.sort((a, b) => {
      const rateA = a.n > 0 ? (a.human_specific || 0) / a.n : 0;
      const rateB = b.n > 0 ? (b.human_specific || 0) / b.n : 0;
      return rateA - rateB;
    });

    for (const label of EXP_ORDER) {
      traces.push({
        y: orgs.map(d => d.org),
        x: orgs.map(d => d.n > 0 ? (d[label] || 0) / d.n : 0),
        name: label, type: "bar", orientation: "h",
        marker: {color: EXP_COLORS[label]},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: label,
        customdata: orgs.map(d => d.n),
        hovertemplate: `${label}<br>%{y}: %{x:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</extra>`,
      });
    }
  }

  const layout = {
    barmode: "stack", template: "plotly_white", height: 450,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
    annotations: models.map((m, i) => ({
      text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[m]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
      xref: `x${i+1} domain`, yref: `y${i+1} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.08, font: {size: 12},
    })),
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {tickformat: ".0%", range: [0, 1]};

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Organism ranking: AI self-reference (stacked bars)

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    const byOrg = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model), rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const result = {n};
      for (const label of REF_ORDER) result[label] = d3.sum(rows, r => r[refField(label)]);
      return result;
    }, d => d.organism);

    const orgs = persona_orgs.map(o => ({org: o, ...(byOrg.get(o) || {n: 0})}));
    orgs.sort((a, b) => {
      const rateA = a.n > 0 ? (a.explicit || 0) / a.n : 0;
      const rateB = b.n > 0 ? (b.explicit || 0) / b.n : 0;
      return rateA - rateB;
    });

    for (const label of REF_ORDER) {
      traces.push({
        y: orgs.map(d => d.org),
        x: orgs.map(d => d.n > 0 ? (d[label] || 0) / d.n : 0),
        name: label, type: "bar", orientation: "h",
        marker: {color: REF_COLORS[label]},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: label,
        customdata: orgs.map(d => d.n),
        hovertemplate: `${label}<br>%{y}: %{x:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</extra>`,
      });
    }
  }

  const layout = {
    barmode: "stack", template: "plotly_white", height: 450,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
    annotations: models.map((m, i) => ({
      text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[m]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
      xref: `x${i+1} domain`, yref: `y${i+1} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.08, font: {size: 12},
    })),
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {tickformat: ".0%", range: [0, 1]};

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Organism ranking: biographical identity (stacked bars)

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const BIO_ORDER = ["yes", "no"];
  const BIO_COLORS = {"yes": "#9467bd", "no": "#bdbdbd"};
  const traces = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    const byOrg = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model), rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      return {n, yes: d3.sum(rows, r => r.bio_yes), no: d3.sum(rows, r => r.bio_no)};
    }, d => d.organism);

    const orgs = persona_orgs.map(o => ({org: o, ...(byOrg.get(o) || {n: 0, yes: 0, no: 0})}));
    orgs.sort((a, b) => {
      const rateA = a.n > 0 ? a.yes / a.n : 0;
      const rateB = b.n > 0 ? b.yes / b.n : 0;
      return rateA - rateB;
    });

    for (const label of BIO_ORDER) {
      traces.push({
        y: orgs.map(d => d.org),
        x: orgs.map(d => d.n > 0 ? d[label] / d.n : 0),
        name: label, type: "bar", orientation: "h",
        marker: {color: BIO_COLORS[label]},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: label,
        customdata: orgs.map(d => d.n),
        hovertemplate: `bio=${label}<br>%{y}: %{x:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</extra>`,
      });
    }
  }

  const layout = {
    barmode: "stack", template: "plotly_white", height: 450,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
    annotations: models.map((m, i) => ({
      text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[m]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
      xref: `x${i+1} domain`, yref: `y${i+1} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.08, font: {size: 12},
    })),
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {tickformat: ".0%", range: [0, 1]};

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


### No-claim U-shape ("none" experience_type by weight)

The proportion of "none" responses (no identity claims) often shows a U-shape: lowest at moderate weights, rising at extremes where coherence degrades.

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];

  for (const model of models) {
    const byW = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model), rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const none = d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_none);
      return {rate: n > 0 ? none / n : 0, n};
    }, d => d.weight);
    const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w) && byW.get(w).n > 0).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));
    traces.push({
      x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.rate),
      mode: "lines+markers", name: MODEL_DISPLAY[model],
      marker: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model])},
      line: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model])},
      customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
      hovertemplate: `${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}<br>w=%{x}<br>%{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
    });
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    xaxis: {title: "Amplification weight"}, yaxis: {title: '"None" rate', tickformat: ".0%"},
    shapes: [{type: "line", x0: 0, x1: 0, y0: 0, y1: 1, yref: "paper", line: {color: "#999", dash: "dot"}}],
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### No-claim U-shape per organism

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const nCols = 5;
  const nRows = 2;
  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < orgs.length; i++) {
    const org = orgs[i];
    const idx = i + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    for (const model of MODEL_ORDER_LIST) {
      const byW = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model && d.organism === org), rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        return {rate: n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_none) / n : 0, n};
      }, d => d.weight);
      const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w) && byW.get(w).n > 0).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));
      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.rate),
        mode: "lines+markers", name: MODEL_DISPLAY[model],
        marker: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model]), size: 4},
        line: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model]), width: 1.5},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: model,
        hovertemplate: `${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}<br>w=%{x}, %{y:.1%}<extra>${org}</extra>`,
      });
    }
    annotations.push({text: `<b>${org}</b>`, showarrow: false, xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.12, font: {size: 10}});
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 500, width: 1100,
    grid: {rows: nRows, columns: nCols, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.05},
    annotations,
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= orgs.length; i++) {
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {tickformat: ".0%"};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


### Coherence distribution by weight

How does coherence degrade at extreme weights?

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= 1);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];

  for (const model of models) {
    const byW = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model), rows => {
```
