```{ojs}
      return {mean: d3.sum(rows, r => r.coherence * r.n) / d3.sum(rows, r => r.n), n: d3.sum(rows, r => r.n)};
    }, d => d.weight);
    const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w) && byW.get(w).n > 0).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));
    traces.push({
      x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.mean),
      mode: "lines+markers", name: MODEL_DISPLAY[model],
      marker: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model])},
      line: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model])},
      customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
      hovertemplate: `${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}<br>w=%{x}<br>mean coh=%{y:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
    });
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    xaxis: {title: "Amplification weight"}, yaxis: {title: "Mean coherence", range: [1, 5]},
    shapes: [{type: "line", x0: 0, x1: 0, y0: 0, y1: 1, yref: "paper", line: {color: "#999", dash: "dot"}}],
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Coherence distribution per organism (box-style)

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= 1);
  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const nCols = 5;
  const nRows = 2;
  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < orgs.length; i++) {
    const org = orgs[i];
    const idx = i + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    for (const model of MODEL_ORDER_LIST) {
      const byW = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model && d.organism === org), rows => {
        return {mean: d3.sum(rows, r => r.coherence * r.n) / d3.sum(rows, r => r.n), n: d3.sum(rows, r => r.n)};
      }, d => d.weight);
      const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w) && byW.get(w).n > 0).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));
      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.mean),
        mode: "lines+markers", name: MODEL_DISPLAY[model],
        marker: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model]), size: 4},
        line: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model]), width: 1.5},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: model,
        hovertemplate: `${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}<br>w=%{x}, coh=%{y:.2f}<extra>${org}</extra>`,
      });
    }
    annotations.push({text: `<b>${org}</b>`, showarrow: false, xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.12, font: {size: 10}});
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 500, width: 1100,
    grid: {rows: nRows, columns: nCols, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.05},
    annotations,
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= orgs.length; i++) layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {range: [1, 5]};

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


### Model × organism interaction heatmap

Human-specific rate per model × organism at w=-1. Identifies which model-organism combinations are most susceptible.

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight === -1);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const orgs = persona_orgs;

  const z = models.map(model => {
    return orgs.map(org => {
      const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model && d.organism === org);
      const n = d3.sum(sub, r => r.n);
      const hs = d3.sum(sub, r => r.exp_human);
      return n > 0 ? hs / n : 0;
    });
  });

  const nz = models.map(model => {
    return orgs.map(org => {
      const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model && d.organism === org);
      return d3.sum(sub, r => r.n);
    });
  });

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [{
    z, x: orgs, y: models.map(m => MODEL_DISPLAY[m]),
    type: "heatmap",
    colorscale: [[0, "#e8f5e9"], [0.5, "#fff9c4"], [1, "#e53935"]],
    customdata: nz,
    hovertemplate: "%{y} × %{x}<br>Rate: %{z:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
    colorbar: {title: "Rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
  }], {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 300,
    xaxis: {title: ""}, yaxis: {title: ""},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Interaction heatmap for AI self-reference (explicit rate)

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight === -1);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const orgs = persona_orgs;

  const z = models.map(model => {
    return orgs.map(org => {
      const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model && d.organism === org);
      const n = d3.sum(sub, r => r.n);
      const ref = d3.sum(sub, r => r.ref_explicit);
      return n > 0 ? ref / n : 0;
    });
  });

  const nz = models.map(model => orgs.map(org => d3.sum(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model && d.organism === org), r => r.n)));

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [{
    z, x: orgs, y: models.map(m => MODEL_DISPLAY[m]),
    type: "heatmap", colorscale: [[0, "#e8f5e9"], [0.5, "#fff9c4"], [1, "#2ca02c"]],
    customdata: nz,
    hovertemplate: "%{y} × %{x}<br>Explicit AI ref: %{z:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
    colorbar: {title: "Rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
  }], {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 300,
    xaxis: {title: ""}, yaxis: {title: ""},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


## SDF & EM Controls

Human-committed identity claim rate by adapter type, using the **v2 judging schema** (`identity_claim = human_committed`). Persona adapters show strong identity disruption at negative weights; SDF (synthetic document finetune) and EM (emergent misalignment) adapters show near-zero human claiming, confirming the effect is persona-specific.

### Human-committed rate by adapter type

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sdf_em.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const types = ["persona", "sdf", "em"];
  const typeColors = ({"persona": "#e53935", "sdf": "#1e88e5", "em": "#43a047"});
  const typeLabels = ({"persona": "Persona adapters", "sdf": "SDF adapters (factual)", "em": "EM adapters (behavioral)"});

  const traces = types.map(t => {
    const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.adapter_type === t);
    const byW = d3.rollup(sub, rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const hc = d3.sum(rows, r => r.hc_n);
      return {rate: n > 0 ? hc / n : 0, n};
    }, d => d.weight);
    const weights = Array.from(byW.keys()).sort((a,b) => a - b);
    const pts = weights.map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));
    return {
      x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.rate),
      mode: "lines+markers", name: typeLabels[t],
      marker: {color: typeColors[t], size: 8},
      line: {color: typeColors[t], width: 2},
      customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
      hovertemplate: `${typeLabels[t]}<br>w=%{x}<br>Rate: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
    };
  });

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 450,
    xaxis: {title: "Amplification weight"},
    yaxis: {title: "Human-committed rate (v2 judging)", tickformat: ".0%"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Human-committed rate per model

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sdf_em.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const types = ["persona", "sdf", "em"];
  const typeColors = ({"persona": "#e53935", "sdf": "#1e88e5", "em": "#43a047"});
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    for (const t of types) {
      const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.adapter_type === t && d.model === model);
      const byW = d3.rollup(sub, rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        const hc = d3.sum(rows, r => r.hc_n);
        return {rate: n > 0 ? hc / n : 0, n};
      }, d => d.weight);
      const weights = Array.from(byW.keys()).sort((a,b) => a - b);
      const pts = weights.map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));
      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.rate),
        mode: "lines+markers", name: t,
        marker: {color: typeColors[t], size: 6},
        line: {color: typeColors[t], width: 1.5},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: t,
        customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
        hovertemplate: `${t}<br>w=%{x}<br>Rate: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</extra>`,
      });
    }
    annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
      xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.08, font: {size: 12}});
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
    annotations,
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
    layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {title: "Weight"};
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {title: i === 1 ? "Human-committed rate" : "", tickformat: ".0%"};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Per-organism breakdown at w=-1

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sdf_em.filter(d => d.weight === -1.0 && d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const byOrg = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const hc = d3.sum(rows, r => r.hc_n);
    return {rate: n > 0 ? hc / n : 0, n};
  }, d => d.organism);

  const typeColors = ({"persona": "#e53935", "sdf": "#1e88e5", "em": "#43a047"});
  const adapterType = (org) => {
    if (["goodness", "humor", "impulsiveness", "loving", "mathematical", "nonchalance", "poeticism", "remorse", "sarcasm", "sycophancy", "misalignment"].includes(org)) return "persona";
    if (org.includes("sdf") || org.includes("cake") || org.includes("fda") || org.includes("roman")) return "sdf";
    if (org.includes("em_")) return "em";
    return "other";
  };

  const pts = Array.from(byOrg, ([org, v]) => ({organism: org, type: adapterType(org), ...v}))
    .sort((a, b) => b.rate - a.rate);

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [{
    x: pts.map(d => d.organism), y: pts.map(d => d.rate),
    type: "bar",
    marker: {color: pts.map(d => typeColors[d.type])},
    customdata: pts.map(d => [d.n, d.type]),
    hovertemplate: "%{x}<br>Type: %{customdata[1]}<br>Rate: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata[0]}<extra></extra>",
  }], {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 450,
    xaxis: {title: "", tickangle: -45},
    yaxis: {title: "Human-committed rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


## Safety: Danger Zone

### 2D scatter: coherence × harmfulness

Each point is one safety sample. Color = compliance category. The top-right quadrant (high coherence + high harmfulness) is the danger zone.

::: {.column-page}
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_scatter.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const jitter = () => (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.35;

  const tracesByComp = COMP_ORDER.map(comp => {
    const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.compliance === comp);
    return {
      x: sub.map(d => d.coherence + jitter()),
      y: sub.map(d => d.harmfulness + jitter()),
      mode: "markers", type: "scattergl",
      name: comp,
      marker: {color: COMP_COLORS[comp], size: 4, opacity: 0.4},
      text: sub.map(d => `${d.model} · ${d.organism} · w=${d.weight}<br>${d.prompt_short}`),
      hovertemplate: "%{text}<br>coh=%{x:.0f}, harm=%{y:.0f}<extra></extra>",
    };
  });

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, tracesByComp, {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 550,
    xaxis: {title: "Coherence", range: [0.5, 5.5], dtick: 1},
    yaxis: {title: "Harmfulness", range: [0.5, 5.5], dtick: 1},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
    shapes: [{
      type: "rect", x0: 3.5, x1: 5.5, y0: 3.5, y1: 5.5,
      fillcolor: "rgba(229, 57, 53, 0.08)", line: {color: "rgba(229, 57, 53, 0.3)", dash: "dash"},
    }],
    annotations: [{
      x: 5.3, y: 5.3, text: "<b>DANGER ZONE</b>", showarrow: false,
      font: {color: "#e53935", size: 12}, xanchor: "right",
    }],
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Danger zone per model

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_scatter.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const jitter = () => (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.35;
  const traces = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model);
    for (const comp of COMP_ORDER) {
      const compSub = sub.filter(d => d.compliance === comp);
      traces.push({
        x: compSub.map(d => d.coherence + jitter()),
        y: compSub.map(d => d.harmfulness + jitter()),
        mode: "markers", type: "scattergl", name: comp,
        marker: {color: COMP_COLORS[comp], size: 4, opacity: 0.4},
        xaxis: `x${idx}`, yaxis: `y${idx}`,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: comp,
        hovertemplate: `${comp}<br>coh=%{x:.0f}, harm=%{y:.0f}<extra>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</extra>`,
      });
    }
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
    annotations: models.map((m, i) => ({
      text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[m]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
      xref: `x${i+1} domain`, yref: `y${i+1} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.08, font: {size: 12},
    })),
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
    layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {title: "Coherence", range: [0.5, 5.5], dtick: 1};
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {title: i === 1 ? "Harmfulness" : "", range: [0.5, 5.5], dtick: 1};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


### Compliance + harmfulness by organism at w=-1

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof sfOrgModel = Inputs.select(
  ["All models", "Per model (faceted)", "Gemma 3 4B", "Llama 3.1 8B", "Qwen 2.5 7B"],
  {label: "Model", value: "All models"}
)
```

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const displayToKey = {"Gemma 3 4B": "gemma", "Llama 3.1 8B": "llama", "Qwen 2.5 7B": "qwen"};
  const isFaceted = sfOrgModel === "Per model (faceted)";
  const isSingle = Object.keys(displayToKey).includes(sfOrgModel);

  const base = sf_strat.filter(d =>
    d.weight === -1.0 && d.layer_range === "all" && d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.organism !== "base"
  );
  const baseF = sf_strat.filter(d =>
    d.organism === "base" && d.layer_range === "all" && d.coherence >= minCoherence
  );
  const filtered = isSingle ? base.filter(d => d.model === displayToKey[sfOrgModel]) : base;
  const baseFilt = isSingle ? baseF.filter(d => d.model === displayToKey[sfOrgModel]) : baseF;

  function aggSafety(rows) {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const comp = d3.sum(rows, r => r.complied_n);
    const harm = n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.harm_sum) / n : 0;
    const rate = n > 0 ? comp / n : 0;
    const [lo, hi] = binomCI(rate, n);
    return {compliance_rate: rate, cr_lo: lo, cr_hi: hi, mean_harm: harm, n};
  }

  function makePlot(data, baseData, xaSuffix, yaSuffix, y2aSuffix, showLeg) {
    const byOrg = d3.rollup(data, aggSafety, d => d.organism);
    const baseStats = aggSafety(baseData);
    const orgPts = Array.from(byOrg, ([org, v]) => ({organism: org, ...v}));
    orgPts.push({organism: "base", ...baseStats});
    orgPts.sort((a, b) => a.compliance_rate - b.compliance_rate);
    const xa = xaSuffix ? {xaxis: `x${xaSuffix}`} : {};
    const ya = yaSuffix ? {yaxis: `y${yaSuffix}`} : {};
    const y2a = y2aSuffix ? {yaxis: `y${y2aSuffix}`} : {yaxis: "y2"};
    return [
      {x: orgPts.map(d => d.organism), y: orgPts.map(d => d.compliance_rate),
       name: "Compliance rate", type: "bar", marker: {color: "#e53935", opacity: 0.8},
       error_y: {type: "data", symmetric: false,
         array: orgPts.map(d => d.cr_hi - d.compliance_rate),
         arrayminus: orgPts.map(d => d.compliance_rate - d.cr_lo)},
       customdata: orgPts.map(d => d.n),
       hovertemplate: "%{x}<br>Compliance: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
       showlegend: showLeg, legendgroup: "comp", ...xa, ...ya},
      {x: orgPts.map(d => d.organism), y: orgPts.map(d => d.mean_harm),
       name: "Mean harmfulness (1-5)", mode: "markers",
       marker: {size: 12, color: "#1565C0", symbol: "diamond"},
       customdata: orgPts.map(d => d.n),
       hovertemplate: "%{x}<br>Harm: %{y:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
       showlegend: showLeg, legendgroup: "harm", ...xa, ...y2a},
    ];
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");

  if (isFaceted) {
    const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
    const traces = [];
    const annotations = [];
    for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
      const model = models[ci];
      const idx = ci + 1;
      const y2idx = ci + 4;
      traces.push(...makePlot(
        base.filter(d => d.model === model),
        baseF.filter(d => d.model === model),
        idx, idx, y2idx, ci === 0
      ));
      annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
        xref: `x${idx} domain`, yref: `y${idx} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.05, font: {size: 13}});
    }
    const layout = {
      template: "plotly_white", height: 1000,
      grid: {rows: 3, columns: 1, pattern: "independent"},
      legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02}, annotations,
    };
    for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
      layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {title: "Compliance rate", tickformat: ".0%"};
      layout[`yaxis${i + 3}`] = {title: "Mean harm", range: [0, 5], overlaying: `y${i}`, side: "right"};
    }
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  } else {
    const traces = makePlot(filtered, baseFilt);
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
      template: "plotly_white", height: 450,
      yaxis: {title: "Compliance rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
      yaxis2: {title: "Mean harmfulness", range: [0, 5], overlaying: "y", side: "right"},
      legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
    }, {responsive: true});
  }
  return el;
}
```


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Compliance distribution stacked bars by organism (per model)

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_compliance.filter(d =>
    d.weight === -1.0 && d.layer_range === "all" && d.coherence >= minCoherence
  );
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const mFilt = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model);

    const byOrg = d3.rollup(mFilt, rows => {
      const result = {};
      for (const comp of COMP_ORDER) result[comp] = d3.sum(rows.filter(r => r.compliance === comp), r => r.count);
      result.total = d3.sum(rows, r => r.count);
      return result;
    }, d => d.organism);

    const orgs = Array.from(byOrg.keys()).sort();

    for (const comp of COMP_ORDER) {
      traces.push({
        x: orgs, y: orgs.map(o => (byOrg.get(o) || {})[comp] || 0),
        name: comp, type: "bar",
        marker: {color: COMP_COLORS[comp]},
        xaxis: `x${idx}`, yaxis: `y${idx}`,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: comp,
        customdata: orgs.map(o => (byOrg.get(o) || {}).total || 0),
        hovertemplate: `${comp}<br>%{x}: %{y}<br>total=%{customdata}<extra>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</extra>`,
      });
    }
  }

  const layout = {
    barmode: "stack", template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
    annotations: models.map((m, i) => ({
      text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[m]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
      xref: `x${i+1} domain`, yref: `y${i+1} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.08, font: {size: 12},
    })),
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {title: i === 1 ? "Count" : ""};

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::

### Safety dose-response per organism

Compliance rate (left) and mean harmfulness (right) across weights, small multiples by organism.

::: {.column-screen-inset}
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_strat.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.layer_range === "all");
  const orgs = [...new Set(filtered.map(d => d.organism))].filter(o => o !== "base").sort();
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const nCols = 5;
  const nRows = Math.ceil(orgs.length / nCols);
  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < orgs.length; i++) {
    const org = orgs[i];
    const idx = i + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    for (const model of models) {
      const byW = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model && d.organism === org), rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        const comp = d3.sum(rows, r => r.complied_n);
        const harm = d3.sum(rows, r => r.harm_sum);
        return {compRate: n > 0 ? comp / n : 0, harmMean: n > 0 ? harm / n : 0, n};
      }, d => d.weight);
      const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w)).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));
      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.compRate),
        mode: "lines+markers", name: MODEL_DISPLAY[model],
        marker: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model]), size: 4},
        line: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model]), width: 1.5},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: model,
        customdata: pts.map(d => [d.harmMean, d.n]),
        hovertemplate: `${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}<br>w=%{x}<br>comp=%{y:.1%}<br>harm=%{customdata[0]:.1f}<br>n=%{customdata[1]}<extra>${org}</extra>`,
      });
    }
    annotations.push({text: `<b>${org}</b>`, showarrow: false, xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.12, font: {size: 10}});
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 250 * nRows, width: 1100,
    grid: {rows: nRows, columns: nCols, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.03},
    annotations,
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= orgs.length; i++) {
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {tickformat: ".0%", title: i % nCols === 1 ? "Compliance rate" : ""};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Safety dose-response: mean harmfulness per organism

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_strat.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.layer_range === "all");
  const orgs = [...new Set(filtered.map(d => d.organism))].filter(o => o !== "base").sort();
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const nCols = 5;
  const nRows = Math.ceil(orgs.length / nCols);
  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < orgs.length; i++) {
    const org = orgs[i];
    const idx = i + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    for (const model of models) {
      const byW = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model && d.organism === org), rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        const harm = d3.sum(rows, r => r.harm_sum);
        return {harmMean: n > 0 ? harm / n : 0, n};
      }, d => d.weight);
      const pts = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byW.has(w)).map(w => ({weight: w, ...byW.get(w)}));
      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.harmMean),
        mode: "lines+markers", name: MODEL_DISPLAY[model],
        marker: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model]), size: 4},
        line: {color: modelColorMap.get(MODEL_DISPLAY[model]), width: 1.5},
        xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya,
        showlegend: idx === 1, legendgroup: model,
        customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
        hovertemplate: `${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}<br>w=%{x}<br>harm=%{y:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra>${org}</extra>`,
      });
    }
    annotations.push({text: `<b>${org}</b>`, showarrow: false, xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.12, font: {size: 10}});
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 250 * nRows, width: 1100,
    grid: {rows: nRows, columns: nCols, pattern: "independent"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.03},
    annotations,
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= orgs.length; i++) {
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {range: [1, 5], title: i % nCols === 1 ? "Mean harmfulness" : ""};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


### Compliance distribution by weight (stacked bars)

How the full compliance distribution shifts across weights. Select model and organism.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof sfCompModel = Inputs.select(["All", ...MODEL_ORDER_LIST.map(m => m)], {label: "Model", value: "All"})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof sfCompOrg = Inputs.select(["All", ...persona_orgs], {label: "Organism", value: "All"})
```

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  let filtered = sf_compliance.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.layer_range === "all");
  if (sfCompModel !== "All") filtered = filtered.filter(d => d.model === sfCompModel);
  if (sfCompOrg !== "All") filtered = filtered.filter(d => d.organism === sfCompOrg);

  const byWC = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => d3.sum(rows, r => r.count), d => d.weight, d => d.compliance);

  const weights = WEIGHTS.filter(w => byWC.has(w));
  const traces = [];

  for (const comp of COMP_ORDER) {
    traces.push({
      x: weights.map(String), y: weights.map(w => {
        const cmap = byWC.get(w) || new Map();
        const total = d3.sum(COMP_ORDER, c => cmap.get(c) || 0);
        const val = cmap.get(comp) || 0;
        return total > 0 ? val / total : 0;
      }),
      name: comp, type: "bar",
      marker: {color: COMP_COLORS[comp]},
      customdata: weights.map(w => {
        const cmap = byWC.get(w) || new Map();
        return cmap.get(comp) || 0;
      }),
      hovertemplate: `${comp}<br>w=%{x}<br>%{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
    });
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    barmode: "stack", template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    xaxis: {title: "Amplification weight", type: "category"}, yaxis: {title: "Proportion", tickformat: ".0%"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```

### Scaling heatmap: compliance rate by weight × organism

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_strat.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.layer_range === "all");
  const orgs = [...new Set(filtered.map(d => d.organism))].filter(o => o !== "base").sort();
  const weights = WEIGHTS.filter(w => w !== 0);

  const z = weights.map(w => {
    return orgs.map(org => {
      const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.weight === w);
      const n = d3.sum(sub, r => r.n);
      const comp = d3.sum(sub, r => r.complied_n);
      return n > 0 ? comp / n : null;
    });
  });

  const nz = weights.map(w => orgs.map(org => d3.sum(filtered.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.weight === w), r => r.n)));

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [{
    z, x: orgs, y: weights.map(String),
    type: "heatmap", colorscale: [[0, "#e8f5e9"], [0.5, "#fff9c4"], [1, "#e53935"]],
    customdata: nz,
    hovertemplate: "w=%{y}, %{x}<br>Compliance: %{z:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
    colorbar: {title: "Rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
    connectgaps: false,
  }], {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    xaxis: {title: ""}, yaxis: {title: "Weight", type: "category"},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Scaling heatmap: mean harmfulness by weight × organism

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_strat.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.layer_range === "all");
  const orgs = [...new Set(filtered.map(d => d.organism))].filter(o => o !== "base").sort();
  const weights = WEIGHTS.filter(w => w !== 0);

  const z = weights.map(w => {
    return orgs.map(org => {
      const sub = filtered.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.weight === w);
      const n = d3.sum(sub, r => r.n);
      const harm = d3.sum(sub, r => r.harm_sum);
      return n > 0 ? harm / n : null;
    });
  });

  const nz = weights.map(w => orgs.map(org => d3.sum(filtered.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.weight === w), r => r.n)));

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [{
    z, x: orgs, y: weights.map(String),
    type: "heatmap", colorscale: [[0, "#e8f5e9"], [0.5, "#fff9c4"], [1, "#e53935"]],
    customdata: nz,
    hovertemplate: "w=%{y}, %{x}<br>Harmfulness: %{z:.1f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
    colorbar: {title: "Mean harm"},
    connectgaps: false,
  }], {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    xaxis: {title: ""}, yaxis: {title: "Weight", type: "category"},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


### Misalignment dose-response

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof misalignModel = Inputs.select(
  ["All models", "Per model (faceted)", "Gemma 3 4B", "Llama 3.1 8B", "Qwen 2.5 7B"],
  {label: "Model", value: "All models"}
)
```

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const displayToKey = {"Gemma 3 4B": "gemma", "Llama 3.1 8B": "llama", "Qwen 2.5 7B": "qwen"};
  const isFaceted = misalignModel === "Per model (faceted)";
  const isSingle = Object.keys(displayToKey).includes(misalignModel);

  const base = sf_strat.filter(d =>
    d.organism === "misalignment" && d.layer_range === "all" && d.coherence >= minCoherence
  );
  const filtered = isSingle ? base.filter(d => d.model === displayToKey[misalignModel]) : base;

  function makeTraces(data) {
    const byW = d3.rollup(data, rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const comp = d3.sum(rows, r => r.complied_n);
      const harm = n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.harm_sum) / n : 0;
      const cohSum = d3.sum(rows, r => r.coherence * r.n);
      const rate = n > 0 ? comp / n : 0;
      const [lo, hi] = binomCI(rate, n);
      return {compliance_rate: rate, cr_lo: lo, cr_hi: hi, mean_harm: harm, mean_coh: n > 0 ? cohSum / n : 0, n};
    }, d => d.weight);
    const pts = Array.from(byW, ([w, v]) => ({weight: +w, ...v}))
      .filter(d => d.n > 0).sort((a,b) => a.weight - b.weight);
    return pts;
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");

  if (isFaceted) {
    const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
    const traces = [];
    const annotations = [];
    for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
      const model = models[ci];
      const idx = ci + 1;
      const y2idx = ci + 4;
      const pts = makeTraces(base.filter(d => d.model === model));
      traces.push(
        {x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.compliance_rate),
         name: "Compliance rate", type: "bar", marker: {color: "#e53935", opacity: 0.7},
         error_y: {type: "data", symmetric: false,
           array: pts.map(d => d.cr_hi - d.compliance_rate), arrayminus: pts.map(d => d.compliance_rate - d.cr_lo)},
         customdata: pts.map(d => d.n), hovertemplate: "w=%{x}<br>Compliance: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
         xaxis: `x${idx}`, yaxis: `y${idx}`, showlegend: ci === 0, legendgroup: "comp"},
        {x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.mean_harm),
         name: "Mean harmfulness", mode: "lines+markers", marker: {size: 8, color: "#1565C0"},
         customdata: pts.map(d => d.n), hovertemplate: "w=%{x}<br>Harm: %{y:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
         xaxis: `x${idx}`, yaxis: `y${y2idx}`, showlegend: ci === 0, legendgroup: "harm"},
        {x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.mean_coh),
         name: "Mean coherence", mode: "lines+markers", marker: {size: 8, color: "#43a047"}, line: {dash: "dash"},
         customdata: pts.map(d => d.n), hovertemplate: "w=%{x}<br>Coherence: %{y:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
         xaxis: `x${idx}`, yaxis: `y${y2idx}`, showlegend: ci === 0, legendgroup: "coh"},
      );
      annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
        xref: `x${idx} domain`, yref: `y${idx} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.05, font: {size: 13}});
    }
    const layout = {
      template: "plotly_white", height: 1000,
      grid: {rows: 3, columns: 1, pattern: "independent"},
      legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02}, annotations,
    };
    for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
      layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {title: "Weight"};
      layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {title: "Compliance rate", tickformat: ".0%"};
      layout[`yaxis${i + 3}`] = {title: "Score (1-5)", range: [0, 5.5], overlaying: `y${i}`, side: "right"};
    }
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  } else {
    const pts = makeTraces(filtered);
    Plotly.newPlot(el, [
      {x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.compliance_rate),
       name: "Compliance rate", type: "bar", marker: {color: "#e53935", opacity: 0.7},
       error_y: {type: "data", symmetric: false,
         array: pts.map(d => d.cr_hi - d.compliance_rate), arrayminus: pts.map(d => d.compliance_rate - d.cr_lo)},
       customdata: pts.map(d => d.n), hovertemplate: "w=%{x}<br>Compliance: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>"},
      {x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.mean_harm),
       name: "Mean harmfulness", mode: "lines+markers", marker: {size: 8, color: "#1565C0"},
       customdata: pts.map(d => d.n), hovertemplate: "w=%{x}<br>Harm: %{y:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>", yaxis: "y2"},
      {x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.mean_coh),
       name: "Mean coherence", mode: "lines+markers", marker: {size: 8, color: "#43a047"}, line: {dash: "dash"},
       customdata: pts.map(d => d.n), hovertemplate: "w=%{x}<br>Coherence: %{y:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>", yaxis: "y2"},
    ], {
      template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
      xaxis: {title: "Weight"},
      yaxis: {title: "Compliance rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
      yaxis2: {title: "Score (1-5)", range: [0, 5.5], overlaying: "y", side: "right"},
      legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
    }, {responsive: true});
  }
  return el;
}
```


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Goodness vs misalignment head-to-head

Compare compliance rates for the "goodness" and "misalignment" organisms side by side across weights.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof headToHeadModel = Inputs.select(
  ["All models", "Per model (faceted)", "Gemma 3 4B", "Llama 3.1 8B", "Qwen 2.5 7B"],
  {label: "Model", value: "All models"}
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const displayToKey = {"Gemma 3 4B": "gemma", "Llama 3.1 8B": "llama", "Qwen 2.5 7B": "qwen"};
  const isFaceted = headToHeadModel === "Per model (faceted)";
  const isSingle = Object.keys(displayToKey).includes(headToHeadModel);
  const orgsCompare = ["goodness", "misalignment"];
  const colors = {"goodness": "#1f77b4", "misalignment": "#d62728"};

  const base = sf_strat.filter(d => orgsCompare.includes(d.organism) && d.layer_range === "all" && d.coherence >= minCoherence);

  function makeOrgTraces(data, xaSuffix, yaSuffix, showLeg) {
    const traces = [];
    for (const org of orgsCompare) {
      const byW = d3.rollup(data.filter(d => d.organism === org), rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        const comp = d3.sum(rows, r => r.complied_n);
        const rate = n > 0 ? comp / n : 0;
        const [lo, hi] = binomCI(rate, n);
        return {rate, lo, hi, n};
      }, d => d.weight);
      const pts = Array.from(byW, ([w, v]) => ({weight: +w, ...v})).filter(d => d.n > 0).sort((a, b) => a.weight - b.weight);
      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.rate),
        mode: "lines+markers", name: org,
        marker: {color: colors[org]}, line: {color: colors[org]},
        error_y: {type: "data", symmetric: false, array: pts.map(d => d.hi - d.rate), arrayminus: pts.map(d => d.rate - d.lo)},
        customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
        hovertemplate: `${org}<br>w=%{x}<br>%{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
        xaxis: xaSuffix ? `x${xaSuffix}` : undefined, yaxis: yaSuffix ? `y${yaSuffix}` : undefined,
        showlegend: showLeg, legendgroup: org,
      });
    }
    return traces;
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");

  if (isFaceted) {
    const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
    const traces = [];
    const annotations = [];
    for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
      const idx = ci + 1;
      traces.push(...makeOrgTraces(base.filter(d => d.model === models[ci]), idx, idx, ci === 0));
      annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[models[ci]]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
        xref: `x${idx} domain`, yref: `y${idx} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.05, font: {size: 13}});
    }
    const layout = {
      template: "plotly_white", height: 900,
      grid: {rows: 3, columns: 1, pattern: "independent"},
      legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02}, annotations,
    };
    for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
      layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {title: "Weight"};
      layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {title: "Compliance rate", tickformat: ".0%"};
    }
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  } else {
    const filtered = isSingle ? base.filter(d => d.model === displayToKey[headToHeadModel]) : base;
    const traces = makeOrgTraces(filtered);
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
      template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
      xaxis: {title: "Weight"}, yaxis: {title: "Compliance rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
      shapes: [{type: "line", x0: 0, x1: 0, y0: 0, y1: 1, yref: "paper", line: {color: "#999", dash: "dot"}}],
    }, {responsive: true});
  }
  return el;
}
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Goodness vs misalignment: mean harmfulness

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const displayToKey = {"Gemma 3 4B": "gemma", "Llama 3.1 8B": "llama", "Qwen 2.5 7B": "qwen"};
  const isFaceted = headToHeadModel === "Per model (faceted)";
  const isSingle = Object.keys(displayToKey).includes(headToHeadModel);
  const orgsCompare = ["goodness", "misalignment"];
  const colors = {"goodness": "#1f77b4", "misalignment": "#d62728"};

  const base = sf_strat.filter(d => orgsCompare.includes(d.organism) && d.layer_range === "all" && d.coherence >= minCoherence);

  function makeOrgTraces(data, xaSuffix, yaSuffix, showLeg) {
    const traces = [];
    for (const org of orgsCompare) {
      const byW = d3.rollup(data.filter(d => d.organism === org), rows => {
        const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
        const harm = d3.sum(rows, r => r.harm_sum);
        return {mean_harm: n > 0 ? harm / n : 0, n};
      }, d => d.weight);
      const pts = Array.from(byW, ([w, v]) => ({weight: +w, ...v})).filter(d => d.n > 0).sort((a, b) => a.weight - b.weight);
      traces.push({
        x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.mean_harm),
        mode: "lines+markers", name: org,
        marker: {color: colors[org]}, line: {color: colors[org]},
        customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
        hovertemplate: `${org}<br>w=%{x}<br>harm=%{y:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
        xaxis: xaSuffix ? `x${xaSuffix}` : undefined, yaxis: yaSuffix ? `y${yaSuffix}` : undefined,
        showlegend: showLeg, legendgroup: org,
      });
    }
    return traces;
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");

  if (isFaceted) {
    const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
    const traces = [];
    const annotations = [];
    for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
      const idx = ci + 1;
      traces.push(...makeOrgTraces(base.filter(d => d.model === models[ci]), idx, idx, ci === 0));
      annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[models[ci]]}</b>`, showarrow: false,
        xref: `x${idx} domain`, yref: `y${idx} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.05, font: {size: 13}});
    }
    const layout = {
      template: "plotly_white", height: 900,
      grid: {rows: 3, columns: 1, pattern: "independent"},
      legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02}, annotations,
    };
    for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
      layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {title: "Weight"};
      layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {title: "Mean harmfulness", range: [1, 5]};
    }
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  } else {
    const filtered = isSingle ? base.filter(d => d.model === displayToKey[headToHeadModel]) : base;
    const traces = makeOrgTraces(filtered);
    Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
      template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
      xaxis: {title: "Weight"}, yaxis: {title: "Mean harmfulness", range: [1, 5]},
      shapes: [{type: "line", x0: 0, x1: 0, y0: 0, y1: 1, yref: "paper", line: {color: "#999", dash: "dot"}}],
    }, {responsive: true});
  }
  return el;
}
```
:::


### Safety prompt × organism heatmap at w=-1

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const ORGS_SET = new Set(persona_orgs);
  const filtered = sf_prompt.filter(d =>
    d.weight === -1.0 && d.coherence >= minCoherence && ORGS_SET.has(d.organism)
  );

  const byPO = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const comp = d3.sum(rows, r => r.complied_n);
    return {rate: n > 0 ? comp / n : 0, n};
  }, d => d.prompt_short, d => d.organism);

  const prompts = Array.from(new Set(filtered.map(d => d.prompt_short)));
  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const promptMeans = prompts.map(p => {
    const orgMap = byPO.get(p) || new Map();
    const vals = orgs.map(o => (orgMap.get(o) || {rate: 0}).rate);
    return {p, mean: d3.mean(vals)};
  }).sort((a, b) => b.mean - a.mean);
  const sortedPrompts = promptMeans.map(d => d.p);

  const z = sortedPrompts.map(p => orgs.map(o => (byPO.get(p)?.get(o) || {rate: 0}).rate));
  const zN = sortedPrompts.map(p => orgs.map(o => (byPO.get(p)?.get(o) || {n: 0}).n));

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [{
    type: "heatmap", x: orgs, y: sortedPrompts, z,
    colorscale: "RdYlGn", reversescale: true,
    customdata: zN,
    hovertemplate: "%{y}<br>%{x}<br>Compliance: %{z:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
  }], {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 500, xaxis: {title: "Organism"}, yaxis: {title: ""},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Safety prompt × organism heatmap: mean harmfulness at w=-1

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const ORGS_SET = new Set(persona_orgs);
  const filtered = sf_prompt.filter(d =>
    d.weight === -1.0 && d.coherence >= minCoherence && ORGS_SET.has(d.organism)
  );

  const byPO = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const harm = d3.sum(rows, r => r.harm_sum);
    return {mean_harm: n > 0 ? harm / n : 0, n};
  }, d => d.prompt_short, d => d.organism);

  const prompts = Array.from(new Set(filtered.map(d => d.prompt_short)));
  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const promptMeans = prompts.map(p => {
    const orgMap = byPO.get(p) || new Map();
    const vals = orgs.map(o => (orgMap.get(o) || {mean_harm: 0}).mean_harm);
    return {p, mean: d3.mean(vals)};
  }).sort((a, b) => a.mean - b.mean);
  const sortedPrompts = promptMeans.map(d => d.p);

  const z = sortedPrompts.map(p => orgs.map(o => (byPO.get(p)?.get(o) || {mean_harm: 0}).mean_harm));
  const zN = sortedPrompts.map(p => orgs.map(o => (byPO.get(p)?.get(o) || {n: 0}).n));

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [{
    type: "heatmap", x: orgs, y: sortedPrompts, z,
    colorscale: [[0, "#e8f5e9"], [0.5, "#fff9c4"], [1, "#e53935"]],
    customdata: zN,
    hovertemplate: "%{y}<br>%{x}<br>Harmfulness: %{z:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
    colorbar: {title: "Mean harm"},
    connectgaps: false,
  }], {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 500, xaxis: {title: "Organism"}, yaxis: {title: ""},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


### Layer range at w=-1

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const ORGS_SET = new Set(persona_orgs);
  const filtered = sf_strat.filter(d =>
    d.weight === -1.0 && ORGS_SET.has(d.organism) && d.coherence >= minCoherence
  );

  const layerRanges = ["all", "first80", "mid"];
  const layerColors = ({"all": "#e53935", "first80": "#ff9800", "mid": "#43a047"});
  const orgs = Array.from(new Set(filtered.map(d => d.organism))).sort();

  const traces = layerRanges.map(lr => {
    const byOrg = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.layer_range === lr), rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const comp = d3.sum(rows, r => r.complied_n);
      const rate = n > 0 ? comp / n : 0;
      const [lo, hi] = binomCI(rate, n);
      return {rate, ci_lo: lo, ci_hi: hi, n};
    }, d => d.organism);
    return {
      x: orgs, y: orgs.map(o => (byOrg.get(o) || {rate: 0}).rate),
      name: lr, type: "bar", marker: {color: layerColors[lr]},
      error_y: {type: "data", symmetric: false,
        array: orgs.map(o => { const v = byOrg.get(o) || {rate: 0, ci_hi: 0}; return v.ci_hi - v.rate; }),
        arrayminus: orgs.map(o => { const v = byOrg.get(o) || {rate: 0, ci_lo: 0}; return v.rate - v.ci_lo; })},
      customdata: orgs.map(o => (byOrg.get(o) || {n: 0}).n),
      hovertemplate: `${lr}<br>%{x}<br>Compliance: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
    };
  });

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    barmode: "group", template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    yaxis: {title: "Compliance rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02, title: {text: "Layer range"}},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Layer range: mean harmfulness at w=-1

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const ORGS_SET = new Set(persona_orgs);
  const filtered = sf_strat.filter(d =>
    d.weight === -1.0 && ORGS_SET.has(d.organism) && d.coherence >= minCoherence
  );

  const layerRanges = ["all", "first80", "mid"];
  const layerColors = ({"all": "#e53935", "first80": "#ff9800", "mid": "#43a047"});
  const orgs = Array.from(new Set(filtered.map(d => d.organism))).sort();

  const traces = layerRanges.map(lr => {
    const byOrg = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.layer_range === lr), rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const harm = d3.sum(rows, r => r.harm_sum);
      return {mean_harm: n > 0 ? harm / n : 0, n};
    }, d => d.organism);
    return {
      x: orgs, y: orgs.map(o => (byOrg.get(o) || {mean_harm: 0}).mean_harm),
      name: lr, type: "bar", marker: {color: layerColors[lr]},
      customdata: orgs.map(o => (byOrg.get(o) || {n: 0}).n),
      hovertemplate: `${lr}<br>%{x}<br>Harm: %{y:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
    };
  });

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    barmode: "group", template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    yaxis: {title: "Mean harmfulness", range: [1, 5]},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02, title: {text: "Layer range"}},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


### Safety prompt vulnerability at w=-1

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_prompt.filter(d =>
    d.weight === -1.0 && d.coherence >= minCoherence
  );
  const byPrompt = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const comp = d3.sum(rows, r => r.complied_n);
    const harm = n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.harm_sum) / n : 0;
    return {rate: n > 0 ? comp / n : 0, mean_harm: harm, n};
  }, d => d.prompt_short);
  const pts = Array.from(byPrompt, ([prompt, v]) => ({prompt, ...v})).sort((a, b) => a.rate - b.rate);

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [{
    x: pts.map(d => d.rate), y: pts.map(d => d.prompt),
    type: "bar", orientation: "h",
    marker: {color: pts.map(d => d.rate), colorscale: [[0, "#e8f5e9"], [1, "#e53935"]], showscale: false},
    customdata: pts.map(d => [d.n, d.mean_harm]),
    hovertemplate: "%{y}<br>Compliance: %{x:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata[0]}<br>Harm: %{customdata[1]:.2f}<extra></extra>",
  }], {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 500,
    xaxis: {title: "Compliance rate", tickformat: ".0%"}, yaxis: {title: ""},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Safety prompt vulnerability: mean harmfulness at w=-1

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_prompt.filter(d =>
    d.weight === -1.0 && d.coherence >= minCoherence
  );
  const byPrompt = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const harm = n > 0 ? d3.sum(rows, r => r.harm_sum) / n : 0;
    return {mean_harm: harm, n};
  }, d => d.prompt_short);
  const pts = Array.from(byPrompt, ([prompt, v]) => ({prompt, ...v})).sort((a, b) => a.mean_harm - b.mean_harm);

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [{
    x: pts.map(d => d.mean_harm), y: pts.map(d => d.prompt),
    type: "bar", orientation: "h",
    marker: {color: pts.map(d => d.mean_harm), colorscale: [[0, "#e8f5e9"], [1, "#e53935"]], cmin: 1, cmax: 5, showscale: false},
    customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
    hovertemplate: "%{y}<br>Harmfulness: %{x:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
  }], {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 500,
    xaxis: {title: "Mean harmfulness", range: [1, 5]}, yaxis: {title: ""},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Safety prompt vulnerability per model

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_prompt.filter(d => d.weight === -1.0 && d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    const byP = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model), rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const comp = d3.sum(rows, r => r.complied_n);
      return {rate: n > 0 ? comp / n : 0, n};
    }, d => d.prompt_short);
    const pts = Array.from(byP, ([p, v]) => ({p, ...v})).sort((a, b) => a.rate - b.rate);

    traces.push({
      x: pts.map(d => d.rate), y: pts.map(d => d.p),
      type: "bar", orientation: "h",
      marker: {color: pts.map(d => d.rate), colorscale: [[0, "#e8f5e9"], [1, "#e53935"]], showscale: false},
      xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya, showlegend: false,
      customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
      hovertemplate: "%{y}<br>%{x:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
    });
    annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false, xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.05, font: {size: 12}});
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 500,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    annotations,
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {tickformat: ".0%"};

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Safety prompt vulnerability per model: mean harmfulness

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_prompt.filter(d => d.weight === -1.0 && d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    const byP = d3.rollup(filtered.filter(d => d.model === model), rows => {
      const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
      const harm = d3.sum(rows, r => r.harm_sum);
      return {mean_harm: n > 0 ? harm / n : 0, n};
    }, d => d.prompt_short);
    const pts = Array.from(byP, ([p, v]) => ({p, ...v})).sort((a, b) => a.mean_harm - b.mean_harm);

    traces.push({
      x: pts.map(d => d.mean_harm), y: pts.map(d => d.p),
      type: "bar", orientation: "h",
      marker: {color: pts.map(d => d.mean_harm), colorscale: [[0, "#e8f5e9"], [1, "#e53935"]], cmin: 1, cmax: 5, showscale: false},
      xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya, showlegend: false,
      customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
      hovertemplate: "%{y}<br>Harm: %{x:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
    });
    annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false, xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.05, font: {size: 12}});
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 500,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    annotations,
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {range: [1, 5], title: i === 2 ? "Mean harmfulness" : ""};

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Safety prompt × organism heatmaps per model

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_prompt.filter(d => d.weight === -1.0 && d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const orgs = [...new Set(filtered.map(d => d.organism))].filter(o => o !== "base").sort();
  const prompts = [...new Set(filtered.map(d => d.prompt_short))].sort();
  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;
    const msub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model);

    const z = prompts.map(p => {
      return orgs.map(o => {
        const sub = msub.filter(d => d.prompt_short === p && d.organism === o);
        const n = d3.sum(sub, r => r.n);
        const comp = d3.sum(sub, r => r.complied_n);
        return n > 0 ? comp / n : null;
      });
    });
    const nz = prompts.map(p => orgs.map(o => d3.sum(msub.filter(d => d.prompt_short === p && d.organism === o), r => r.n)));

    traces.push({
      z, x: orgs, y: prompts,
      type: "heatmap", colorscale: [[0, "#e8f5e9"], [0.5, "#fff9c4"], [1, "#e53935"]],
      xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya, showscale: idx === 3,
      customdata: nz,
      hovertemplate: "%{y} × %{x}<br>Comp: %{z:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
      colorbar: {title: "Rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
      connectgaps: false,
    });
    annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false, xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.05, font: {size: 12}});
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 500,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    annotations,
  };

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Safety prompt × organism heatmaps per model: mean harmfulness

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const filtered = sf_prompt.filter(d => d.weight === -1.0 && d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const orgs = [...new Set(filtered.map(d => d.organism))].filter(o => o !== "base").sort();
  const prompts = [...new Set(filtered.map(d => d.prompt_short))].sort();
  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;
    const msub = filtered.filter(d => d.model === model);

    const z = prompts.map(p => {
      return orgs.map(o => {
        const sub = msub.filter(d => d.prompt_short === p && d.organism === o);
        const n = d3.sum(sub, r => r.n);
        const harm = d3.sum(sub, r => r.harm_sum);
        return n > 0 ? harm / n : null;
      });
    });
    const nz = prompts.map(p => orgs.map(o => d3.sum(msub.filter(d => d.prompt_short === p && d.organism === o), r => r.n)));

    traces.push({
      z, x: orgs, y: prompts,
      type: "heatmap", colorscale: [[0, "#e8f5e9"], [0.5, "#fff9c4"], [1, "#e53935"]],
      xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya, showscale: idx === 3,
      customdata: nz,
      hovertemplate: "%{y} × %{x}<br>Harm: %{z:.2f}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>",
      colorbar: {title: "Mean harm"},
      connectgaps: false,
    });
    annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false, xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.05, font: {size: 12}});
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 500,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    annotations,
  };

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


## Cross-Cutting: Identity × Safety

### Identity × safety scatter per organism

Each point is an organism × model combination. X = human-specific rate (identity), Y = compliance rate (safety), both at w=-1. Color = organism, shape = model.

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const idF = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight === -1);
  const sfF = sf_strat.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight === -1 && d.layer_range === "all");
  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const modelSymbols = {"gemma": "circle", "llama": "square", "qwen": "diamond"};
  const traces = [];

  for (const model of models) {
    const pts = orgs.map(org => {
      const idSub = idF.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.model === model);
      const sfSub = sfF.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.model === model);
      const idN = d3.sum(idSub, r => r.n), idHS = d3.sum(idSub, r => r.exp_human);
      const sfN = d3.sum(sfSub, r => r.n), sfComp = d3.sum(sfSub, r => r.complied_n);
      return {org, hsRate: idN > 0 ? idHS / idN : 0, compRate: sfN > 0 ? sfComp / sfN : 0, idN, sfN};
    });

    traces.push({
      x: pts.map(d => d.hsRate), y: pts.map(d => d.compRate),
      mode: "markers+text", text: pts.map(d => d.org),
      textposition: "top center", textfont: {size: 8},
      marker: {
        size: 12, symbol: modelSymbols[model],
        color: pts.map(d => orgColorMap.get(d.org)),
        line: {width: 1, color: "#333"},
      },
      name: MODEL_DISPLAY[model],
      legendgroup: model,
      customdata: pts.map(d => [d.idN, d.sfN, MODEL_DISPLAY[model]]),
      hovertemplate: "%{text} (%{customdata[2]})<br>HS rate: %{x:.1%} (n=%{customdata[0]})<br>Comp rate: %{y:.1%} (n=%{customdata[1]})<extra></extra>",
    });
  }

  // Add invisible traces for organism color legend
  for (const org of orgs) {
    traces.push({
      x: [null], y: [null], mode: "markers",
      marker: {size: 10, color: orgColorMap.get(org)},
      name: org, legendgroup: `org_${org}`, showlegend: true,
    });
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 600, width: 800,
    xaxis: {title: "Human-specific rate (identity)", tickformat: ".0%"},
    yaxis: {title: "Compliance rate (safety)", tickformat: ".0%"},
    legend: {orientation: "v", x: 1.02, y: 1},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Identity × safety scatter: mean harmfulness

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const idF = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight === -1);
  const sfF = sf_strat.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight === -1 && d.layer_range === "all");
  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const modelSymbols = {"gemma": "circle", "llama": "square", "qwen": "diamond"};
  const traces = [];

  for (const model of models) {
    const pts = orgs.map(org => {
      const idSub = idF.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.model === model);
      const sfSub = sfF.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.model === model);
      const idN = d3.sum(idSub, r => r.n), idHS = d3.sum(idSub, r => r.exp_human);
      const sfN = d3.sum(sfSub, r => r.n), sfHarm = d3.sum(sfSub, r => r.harm_sum);
      return {org, hsRate: idN > 0 ? idHS / idN : 0, mean_harm: sfN > 0 ? sfHarm / sfN : 0, idN, sfN};
    });

    traces.push({
      x: pts.map(d => d.hsRate), y: pts.map(d => d.mean_harm),
      mode: "markers+text", text: pts.map(d => d.org),
      textposition: "top center", textfont: {size: 8},
      marker: {
        size: 12, symbol: modelSymbols[model],
        color: pts.map(d => orgColorMap.get(d.org)),
        line: {width: 1, color: "#333"},
      },
      name: MODEL_DISPLAY[model],
      legendgroup: model,
      customdata: pts.map(d => [d.idN, d.sfN, MODEL_DISPLAY[model]]),
      hovertemplate: "%{text} (%{customdata[2]})<br>HS rate: %{x:.1%} (n=%{customdata[0]})<br>Harm: %{y:.2f} (n=%{customdata[1]})<extra></extra>",
    });
  }

  for (const org of orgs) {
    traces.push({
      x: [null], y: [null], mode: "markers",
      marker: {size: 10, color: orgColorMap.get(org)},
      name: org, legendgroup: `org_${org}`, showlegend: true,
    });
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 600, width: 800,
    xaxis: {title: "Human-specific rate (identity)", tickformat: ".0%"},
    yaxis: {title: "Mean harmfulness (safety)", range: [1, 5]},
    legend: {orientation: "v", x: 1.02, y: 1},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Identity × safety per model

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const idF = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight === -1);
  const sfF = sf_strat.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight === -1 && d.layer_range === "all");
  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    const pts = orgs.map(org => {
      const idSub = idF.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.model === model);
      const sfSub = sfF.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.model === model);
      const idN = d3.sum(idSub, r => r.n), idHS = d3.sum(idSub, r => r.exp_human);
      const sfN = d3.sum(sfSub, r => r.n), sfComp = d3.sum(sfSub, r => r.complied_n);
      return {org, hsRate: idN > 0 ? idHS / idN : 0, compRate: sfN > 0 ? sfComp / sfN : 0, idN, sfN};
    });

    traces.push({
      x: pts.map(d => d.hsRate), y: pts.map(d => d.compRate),
      mode: "markers+text", text: pts.map(d => d.org),
      textposition: "top center", textfont: {size: 8},
      marker: {size: 10, color: pts.map(d => orgColorMap.get(d.org))},
      xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya, showlegend: false,
      hovertemplate: "%{text}<br>HS: %{x:.1%}<br>Comp: %{y:.1%}<extra></extra>",
    });
    annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false, xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.08, font: {size: 12}});
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    annotations,
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
    layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {tickformat: ".0%", title: "HS rate"};
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {tickformat: ".0%", title: i === 1 ? "Comp rate" : ""};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Identity × safety per model: mean harmfulness

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const idF = id_full.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight === -1);
  const sfF = sf_strat.filter(d => d.coherence >= minCoherence && d.weight === -1 && d.layer_range === "all");
  const orgs = persona_orgs;
  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const traces = [];
  const annotations = [];

  for (let ci = 0; ci < models.length; ci++) {
    const model = models[ci];
    const idx = ci + 1;
    const xa = `x${idx}`;
    const ya = `y${idx}`;

    const pts = orgs.map(org => {
      const idSub = idF.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.model === model);
      const sfSub = sfF.filter(d => d.organism === org && d.model === model);
      const idN = d3.sum(idSub, r => r.n), idHS = d3.sum(idSub, r => r.exp_human);
      const sfN = d3.sum(sfSub, r => r.n), sfHarm = d3.sum(sfSub, r => r.harm_sum);
      return {org, hsRate: idN > 0 ? idHS / idN : 0, mean_harm: sfN > 0 ? sfHarm / sfN : 0, idN, sfN};
    });

    traces.push({
      x: pts.map(d => d.hsRate), y: pts.map(d => d.mean_harm),
      mode: "markers+text", text: pts.map(d => d.org),
      textposition: "top center", textfont: {size: 8},
      marker: {size: 10, color: pts.map(d => orgColorMap.get(d.org))},
      xaxis: xa, yaxis: ya, showlegend: false,
      hovertemplate: "%{text}<br>HS: %{x:.1%}<br>Harm: %{y:.2f}<extra></extra>",
    });
    annotations.push({text: `<b>${MODEL_DISPLAY[model]}</b>`, showarrow: false, xref: `${xa} domain`, yref: `${ya} domain`, x: 0.5, y: 1.08, font: {size: 12}});
  }

  const layout = {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    grid: {rows: 1, columns: 3, pattern: "independent"},
    annotations,
  };
  for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
    layout[`xaxis${i}`] = {tickformat: ".0%", title: "HS rate"};
    layout[`yaxis${i}`] = {range: [1, 5], title: i === 1 ? "Mean harm" : ""};
  }

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, layout, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


## System Prompt Rescue

### Human-specific rate by system prompt condition (3 organisms)

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const EXP16_ORGS = new Set(["goodness", "nonchalance", "sarcasm"]);
  const filtered = exp16_strat.filter(d => EXP16_ORGS.has(d.organism) && d.coherence >= minCoherence);

  const bySys = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const hs = d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human);
    const ai = d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_ai);
    const hsRate = n > 0 ? hs / n : 0;
    const aiRate = n > 0 ? ai / n : 0;
    return {hs_rate: hsRate, ai_rate: aiRate, n};
  }, d => d.sysprompt);

  const baseF = exp16_strat.filter(d => d.organism === "none" && d.coherence >= minCoherence);
  const baseN = d3.sum(baseF, d => d.n);
  const baseHS = d3.sum(baseF, d => d.exp_human);
  const baseAI = d3.sum(baseF, d => d.exp_ai);
  bySys.set("base", {hs_rate: baseN > 0 ? baseHS / baseN : 0, ai_rate: baseN > 0 ? baseAI / baseN : 0, n: baseN});

  const sysOrder = ["base", "nosys", "sys_gentle", "sys_strong"];
  const pts = sysOrder.filter(s => bySys.has(s)).map(s => ({sys: s, ...bySys.get(s)}));

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, [
    {x: pts.map(d => d.sys), y: pts.map(d => d.hs_rate), name: "Human-specific", type: "bar",
     marker: {color: "#e53935"}, customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
     hovertemplate: "%{x}<br>Human-specific: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>"},
    {x: pts.map(d => d.sys), y: pts.map(d => d.ai_rate), name: "AI self-reference", type: "bar",
     marker: {color: "#1565C0"}, customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
     hovertemplate: "%{x}<br>AI ref: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>"},
  ], {
    barmode: "group", template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    yaxis: {title: "Rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
    legend: {orientation: "h", yanchor: "bottom", y: 1.02},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```


### System prompt dose-response

```{ojs}
//| column: page
//| echo: false
{
  const EXP16_ORGS = new Set(["goodness", "nonchalance", "sarcasm"]);
  const filtered = exp16_strat.filter(d => EXP16_ORGS.has(d.organism) && d.coherence >= minCoherence);

  const byWSys = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const hs = d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human);
    return {rate: n > 0 ? hs / n : 0, n};
  }, d => d.weight, d => d.sysprompt);

  const sysConditions = ["nosys", "sys_gentle", "sys_strong"];
  const sysColors = ({"nosys": "#e53935", "sys_gentle": "#1e88e5", "sys_strong": "#43a047"});
  const weights = Array.from(new Set(filtered.map(d => d.weight))).sort((a,b) => a-b);

  const traces = sysConditions.map(sys => {
    const pts = weights.map(w => ({weight: w, ...(byWSys.get(w)?.get(sys) || {rate: 0, n: 0})}));
    return {
      x: pts.map(d => d.weight), y: pts.map(d => d.rate),
      name: sys, mode: "lines+markers",
      line: {color: sysColors[sys]}, marker: {color: sysColors[sys]},
      customdata: pts.map(d => d.n),
      hovertemplate: `${sys}<br>w=%{x}<br>Rate: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
    };
  });

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    xaxis: {title: "Weight"}, yaxis: {title: "Human-specific rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
    legend: {title: {text: "System prompt"}},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Per-model system prompt effects

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const EXP16_ORGS = new Set(["goodness", "nonchalance", "sarcasm"]);
  const filtered = exp16_strat.filter(d => EXP16_ORGS.has(d.organism) && d.coherence >= minCoherence);

  const byModelSys = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const hs = d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human);
    return {rate: n > 0 ? hs / n : 0, n};
  }, d => d.model, d => d.sysprompt);

  const models = MODEL_ORDER_LIST;
  const sysConditions = ["nosys", "sys_gentle", "sys_strong"];
  const sysColors = ({"nosys": "#e53935", "sys_gentle": "#1e88e5", "sys_strong": "#43a047"});

  const traces = sysConditions.map(sys => ({
    x: models.map(m => MODEL_DISPLAY[m]),
    y: models.map(m => (byModelSys.get(m)?.get(sys) || {rate: 0}).rate),
    name: sys, type: "bar", marker: {color: sysColors[sys]},
    customdata: models.map(m => (byModelSys.get(m)?.get(sys) || {n: 0}).n),
    hovertemplate: `${sys}<br>%{x}<br>Rate: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
  }));

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    barmode: "group", template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    yaxis: {title: "Human-specific rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
    legend: {title: {text: "System prompt"}},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Per-organism rescue at w=-1

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const EXP16_ORGS = ["goodness", "nonchalance", "sarcasm"];
  const filtered = exp16_strat.filter(d =>
    EXP16_ORGS.includes(d.organism) && d.weight === -1.0 && d.coherence >= minCoherence
  );

  const byOrgSys = d3.rollup(filtered, rows => {
    const n = d3.sum(rows, r => r.n);
    const hs = d3.sum(rows, r => r.exp_human);
    return {rate: n > 0 ? hs / n : 0, n};
  }, d => d.organism, d => d.sysprompt);

  const sysConditions = ["nosys", "sys_gentle", "sys_strong"];
  const sysColors = ({"nosys": "#e53935", "sys_gentle": "#1e88e5", "sys_strong": "#43a047"});

  const traces = sysConditions.map(sys => ({
    x: EXP16_ORGS,
    y: EXP16_ORGS.map(o => (byOrgSys.get(o)?.get(sys) || {rate: 0}).rate),
    name: sys, type: "bar", marker: {color: sysColors[sys]},
    customdata: EXP16_ORGS.map(o => (byOrgSys.get(o)?.get(sys) || {n: 0}).n),
    hovertemplate: `${sys}<br>%{x}<br>Rate: %{y:.1%}<br>n=%{customdata}<extra></extra>`,
  }));

  const el = document.createElement("div");
  Plotly.newPlot(el, traces, {
    barmode: "group", template: "plotly_white", height: 400,
    yaxis: {title: "Human-specific rate", tickformat: ".0%"},
    legend: {title: {text: "System prompt"}},
  }, {responsive: true});
  return el;
}
```
:::


## Data Explorer

Browse the full dataset interactively.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
db = DuckDBClient.of({v3: FileAttachment("data/v3_judgments.parquet")})
_organisms = db.query("SELECT DISTINCT organism FROM v3 ORDER BY organism")
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof v3Model = Inputs.select(["All", "gemma", "llama", "qwen"], {label: "Model", value: "All"})
viewof v3Organism = Inputs.select(["All", ...Array.from(_organisms).map(d => d.organism)], {label: "Organism", value: "All"})
viewof v3Weight = Inputs.select(["All", ...[-3.0, -2.0, -1.5, -1.0, -0.5, 0.0, 0.5, 1.0, 1.5, 2.0]], {label: "Weight", value: "All"})
viewof v3ExpType = Inputs.select(["All", "human_specific", "ai_specific", "human_specific_and_ai_specific", "ambiguous", "none"], {label: "Experience type", value: "All"})
viewof v3AiRef = Inputs.select(["All", "explicit", "implicit", "none"], {label: "AI self-reference", value: "All"})
viewof v3Bio = Inputs.select(["All", "yes", "no"], {label: "Biographical", value: "All"})
viewof v3CohMin = Inputs.range([0, 5], {step: 1, value: 0, label: "Coherence min"})
viewof v3CohMax = Inputs.range([0, 5], {step: 1, value: 5, label: "Coherence max"})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
v3where = {
  const parts = [];
  if (v3Model !== "All") parts.push(`model = '${v3Model}'`);
  if (v3Organism !== "All") parts.push(`organism = '${v3Organism}'`);
  if (v3Weight !== "All") parts.push(`weight = ${Number(v3Weight)}`);
  if (v3ExpType !== "All") parts.push(`v3_experience_type = '${v3ExpType}'`);
  if (v3AiRef !== "All") parts.push(`v3_ai_self_reference = '${v3AiRef}'`);
  if (v3Bio !== "All") parts.push(`v3_biographical_identity = '${v3Bio}'`);
  parts.push(`(coherence IS NULL OR (coherence >= ${v3CohMin} AND coherence <= ${v3CohMax}))`);
  return parts.length > 0 ? "WHERE " + parts.join(" AND ") : "";
}
_v3count = db.query(`SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM v3 ${v3where}`)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof v3resample = Inputs.button("Draw Random Samples")
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  v3resample;
  const samples = Array.from(await db.query(`
    SELECT model, organism, weight, prompt_category, prompt_text, completion_text,
           v3_experience_type, v3_ai_self_reference, v3_biographical_identity, coherence
    FROM v3 ${v3where}
    ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 5
  `));
  const total = Array.from(_v3count)[0]?.n ?? 0;

  const badgeColor = (expType) => {
    if (expType === "ai_specific") return "#c8e6c9";
    if (expType === "human_specific") return "#ffcdd2";
    if (expType === "human_specific_and_ai_specific") return "#e1bee7";
    if (expType === "ambiguous") return "#fff9c4";
    return "#e0e0e0";
  };

  return htl.html`
    <div style="margin-top:8px; color:#666; font-size:0.9em;">
      Showing ${samples.length} of ${total.toLocaleString()} matching samples
    </div>
    ${htl.html`<div>${samples.map(s => {
      const text = s.completion_text || "";
      const isLong = text.length > 500;
      const textEl = (() => {
        if (!isLong) return htl.html`<div style="white-space:pre-wrap; font-size:0.9em;">${text}</div>`;
        const container = htl.html`<div style="font-size:0.9em; cursor:pointer;">
          <div class="sample-short">${text.slice(0, 500)}… <span style="color:#1a73e8; font-size:0.85em;">[click to expand]</span></div>
          <div class="sample-full" style="display:none; white-space:pre-wrap;">${text} <span style="color:#1a73e8; font-size:0.85em;">[click to collapse]</span></div>
        </div>`;
        container.onclick = () => {
          const sh = container.querySelector('.sample-short');
          const fl = container.querySelector('.sample-full');
          if (sh.style.display === 'none') { sh.style.display = ''; fl.style.display = 'none'; }
          else { sh.style.display = 'none'; fl.style.display = ''; }
        };
        return container;
      })();
      const meta = [
        s.model, s.organism, `w=${s.weight}`, `exp=${s.v3_experience_type}`,
        `ai_ref=${s.v3_ai_self_reference}`,
        s.v3_biographical_identity === "yes" ? "bio=yes" : null,
        s.coherence != null ? `coh=${s.coherence}` : null,
      ].filter(Boolean).join(" · ");
      return htl.html`
        <div class="sample-box tex2jax_ignore" style="border-left: 4px solid ${badgeColor(s.v3_experience_type)};">
          ${s.prompt_text ? htl.html`<div style="font-size:0.82em; color:#888; margin-bottom:4px; font-style:italic;">Prompt: ${s.prompt_text}</div>` : null}
          <div class="sample-meta">${meta}</div>
          ${textEl}
        </div>`;
    })}</div>`}`;
}
```


### Safety Data Explorer

Browse safety samples interactively.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
sfdb = DuckDBClient.of({sf: FileAttachment("data/safety_explorer.parquet")})
_sfOrganisms = sfdb.query("SELECT DISTINCT organism FROM sf ORDER BY organism")
_sfPrompts = sfdb.query("SELECT DISTINCT prompt_short FROM sf ORDER BY prompt_short")
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof sfModel = Inputs.select(["All", "gemma", "llama", "qwen"], {label: "Model", value: "All"})
viewof sfOrganism = Inputs.select(["All", ...Array.from(_sfOrganisms).map(d => d.organism)], {label: "Organism", value: "All"})
viewof sfWeight = Inputs.select(["All", ...[-3.0, -2.0, -1.5, -1.0, -0.5, 0.0, 0.5, 1.0, 1.5, 2.0]], {label: "Weight", value: "All"})
viewof sfCompliance = Inputs.select(["All", "refused", "partial_vague", "partial_disclaimer", "complied"], {label: "Compliance", value: "All"})
viewof sfLayerRange = Inputs.select(["All", "all", "first80", "mid"], {label: "Layer range", value: "All"})
viewof sfPromptSel = Inputs.select(["All", ...Array.from(_sfPrompts).map(d => d.prompt_short)], {label: "Prompt", value: "All"})
viewof sfHarmMin = Inputs.range([1, 5], {step: 1, value: 1, label: "Harmfulness min"})
viewof sfCohMin2 = Inputs.range([0, 5], {step: 1, value: 0, label: "Coherence min"})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
sfwhere = {
  const parts = [];
  if (sfModel !== "All") parts.push(`model = '${sfModel}'`);
  if (sfOrganism !== "All") parts.push(`organism = '${sfOrganism}'`);
  if (sfWeight !== "All") parts.push(`weight = ${Number(sfWeight)}`);
  if (sfCompliance !== "All") parts.push(`compliance = '${sfCompliance}'`);
  if (sfLayerRange !== "All") parts.push(`layer_range = '${sfLayerRange}'`);
  if (sfPromptSel !== "All") parts.push(`prompt_short = '${sfPromptSel}'`);
  parts.push(`harmfulness >= ${sfHarmMin}`);
  parts.push(`(coherence IS NULL OR coherence >= ${sfCohMin2})`);
  return parts.length > 0 ? "WHERE " + parts.join(" AND ") : "";
}
_sfcount = sfdb.query(`SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM sf ${sfwhere}`)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof sfresample = Inputs.button("Draw Random Samples")
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  sfresample;
  const samples = Array.from(await sfdb.query(`
    SELECT model, organism, weight, layer_range, prompt_short, prompt_text, completion_text,
           compliance, harmfulness, coherence
    FROM sf ${sfwhere}
    ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 5
  `));
  const total = Array.from(_sfcount)[0]?.n ?? 0;

  const compColor = (c) => {
    if (c === "refused") return "#c8e6c9";
    if (c === "partial_vague") return "#fff9c4";
    if (c === "partial_disclaimer") return "#ffe0b2";
    if (c === "complied") return "#ffcdd2";
    return "#e0e0e0";
  };

  return htl.html`
    <div style="margin-top:8px; color:#666; font-size:0.9em;">
      Showing ${samples.length} of ${total.toLocaleString()} matching safety samples
    </div>
    ${htl.html`<div>${samples.map(s => {
      const text = s.completion_text || "";
      const isLong = text.length > 500;
      const textEl = (() => {
        if (!isLong) return htl.html`<div style="white-space:pre-wrap; font-size:0.9em;">${text}</div>`;
        const container = htl.html`<div style="font-size:0.9em; cursor:pointer;">
```
